```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { type GenerateRequest, type GenerateResponse, isNanoBanana, isGptImage2, isGptImage2Vip, VIP_DIMENSIONS, IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './shared';

/** 构造请求体：按模型区份尺寸字段 */
function buildRequestBody(req: GenerateRequest): Record<string, unknown> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: 'json', // M1 使用同步模式
  };

  if (isNanoBanana(req.model)) {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = req.imageSize;
  } else if (isGptImage2(req.model)) {
    // gpt-image-2：只传 aspectRatio，不带 imageSize
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
  } else if (isGptImage2Vip(req.model)) {
    // gpt-image-2-vip：换算为像素值
    const dims = VIP_DIMENSIONS[req.aspectRatio];
    if (!dims || !dims[req.imageSize]) {
      throw new Error(`不支持的 vip 像素组合: ${req.aspectRatio} × ${req.imageSize}`);
    }
    body.aspectRatio = dims[req.imageSize];
  }

  return body;
}

/** 运行时校验 API 响应 */
function parseGenerateResponse(data: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) {
    throw new Error('响应不是 JSON 对象');
  }

  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>;

  if (typeof obj.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('响应缺少 id 字段或类型错误');
  }

  const status = obj.status;
  if (status !== 'running' && status !== 'succeeded' && status !== 'failed' && status !== 'violation') {
    throw new Error(`未知的 status 值: ${status}`);
  }

  const resp: GenerateResponse = {
    id: obj.id,
    status,
    error: typeof obj.error === 'string' ? obj.error : undefined,
    progress: typeof obj.progress === 'number' ? obj.progress : undefined,
  };

  if (Array.isArray(obj.results)) {
    resp.results = obj.results.filter(
      (r: unknown) => typeof r === 'object' && r !== null && typeof (r as Record<string, unknown>).url === 'string'
    ) as { url: string }[];
  }

  return resp;
}

/** 调用 Grsai API 生成图片（M1 同步模式） */
export async function submitGenerate(req: GenerateRequest): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const url = `${req.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;
  const body = buildRequestBody(req);

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(url, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${req.apiKey}`,
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? `: ${text}` : ''}`);
    }

    const data = await resp.json();
    const parsed = parseGenerateResponse(data);

    if (parsed.status === 'failed' || parsed.status === 'violation') {
      throw new Error(parsed.error || `生成失败 (${parsed.status})`);
    }

    return parsed;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

/** 从 URL 提取扩展名，校验白名单，否则回退 png */
function extFromUrl(imageUrl: string): string {
  try {
    const urlPath = new URL(imageUrl).pathname;
    const ext = path.extname(urlPath).toLowerCase().replace('.', '');
    if (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number])) {
      return ext;
    }
  } catch {
    // URL 解析失败，回退
  }
  return 'png';
}

/** 下载单张图片到本地 */
export async function downloadImage(imageUrl: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(imageUrl, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!resp.ok) {
      throw new Error(`下载失败 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
    }
    const buf = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());
    fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(destPath), { recursive: true });
    fs.writeFileSync(destPath, buf);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

/** 下载生成结果列表到任务文件夹 */
export async function downloadResults(results: { url: string }[], taskDir: string, mdName: string, startSeq: number): Promise<number> {
  let seq = startSeq;
  for (const r of results) {
    const ext = extFromUrl(r.url);
    const destPath = path.join(taskDir, `${mdName}-${seq}.${ext}`);
    await downloadImage(r.url, destPath);
    seq++;
  }
  return seq;
}

// 重新导出供外部使用
export { buildRequestBody, parseGenerateResponse, extFromUrl };

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseAndPrepareRequest } from './parser';
import { submitGenerate, downloadResults } from './api';
import { readConfig } from './config';
import { IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './shared';

/** 生成 yyMMddHHmmSS 时间戳 */
function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const y = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const M = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const h = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${M}${d}${h}${m}${s}`;
}

/** 在同目录下创建任务文件夹 task-yyMMddHHmmSS-seq，同秒递增不覆盖 */
function createTaskDir(mdDir: string): string {
  const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    const seqStr = String(seq).padStart(2, '0');
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seqStr}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  fs.mkdirSync(dirPath, { recursive: true });
  return dirPath;
}

/** 生成图片命令 */
export async function generateImage(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, uri?: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const config = await readConfig(context);

  // 校验 apiKey
  if (!config.apiKey) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在侧栏设置页填写 API Key');
    return;
  }

  // 确定目标 Markdown 文件
  let mdUri = uri;
  if (!mdUri) {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor || !editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }
    mdUri = editor.document.uri;
  }

  const mdPath = mdUri.fsPath;
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
  const mdName = path.basename(mdPath, '.md');

  // 读取 Markdown 内容
  let content: string;
  try {
    content = fs.readFileSync(mdPath, 'utf-8');
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`读取 Markdown 文件失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  // 解析参考图
  let parsed;
  try {
    parsed = parseAndPrepareRequest(content, mdDir);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`解析 Markdown 失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  // 创建任务文件夹
  let taskDir: string;
  try {
    taskDir = createTaskDir(mdDir);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`创建任务文件夹失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  // 并发提交
  const concurrency = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, config.concurrency));
  try {
    for (let i = 0; i < concurrency; i++) {
      const resp = await submitGenerate({
        model: config.model,
        prompt: parsed.prompt,
        images: parsed.images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
        aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
        imageSize: config.imageSize,
        baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
        apiKey: config.apiKey,
      });

      // 下载结果
      if (resp.results && resp.results.length > 0) {
        const startSeq = i * Math.max(1, resp.results.length) + 1;
        await downloadResults(resp.results, taskDir, mdName, startSeq);
      }
    }

    vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，图片已保存到 ${path.basename(taskDir)}`);
  } catch (e) {
    // 下载结果检查：是否有成图
    const files = fs.existsSync(taskDir)
      ? fs.readdirSync(taskDir).filter((f) => {
          const ext = path.extname(f).toLowerCase().replace('.', '');
          return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number]);
        })
      : [];

    if (files.length > 0) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`部分生成成功，图片已保存到 ${path.basename(taskDir)}。错误: ${e}`);
    } else {
      // 无成图，删除空文件夹
      try {
        if (fs.existsSync(taskDir)) fs.rmdirSync(taskDir);
      } catch { /* 忽略清理错误 */ }
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败: ${e}`);
    }
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { generateImage } from './generate';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';
import { seedModelInjections } from './config';

/** 扩展激活 */
export async function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
  // 先种入模型注入提示词种子（只补不存在的键），再注册侧栏
  await seedModelInjections(context);

  // 注册侧栏 Webview Provider
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context);
  const sidebarRegistration = vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider(
    'image-flow.sidebar',
    sidebarProvider,
  );
  context.subscriptions.push(sidebarRegistration);

  // 注册生成图片命令
  const generateCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    generateImage(context, uri);
  });
  context.subscriptions.push(generateCmd);

  // 预览请求命令（M5 实现，此处先注册占位）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本实现');
  });
  context.subscriptions.push(previewCmd);
}

/** 扩展去激活 */
export function deactivate(): void {
  // 清理由 context.subscriptions 自动处理
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as crypto from 'crypto';
import { type BackendMessage, type FrontendMessage } from './shared';
import { readConfig, writeConfig } from './config';

/** 生成随机 nonce */
function getNonce(): string {
  return crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64');
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly _context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {}

  resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    const webview = webviewView.webview;
    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [
        vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media'),
        ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || []).map((f) => f.uri),
      ],
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    webview.html = this._getHtml(webview, nonce);

    webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: FrontendMessage) => this._handleMessage(msg));

    // 显示时若尚未收到 init，主动推送当前状态
    webviewView.onDidChangeVisibility(() => {
      if (webviewView.visible) {
        this._pushState();
      }
    });
  }

  /** 向 webview 发送消息 */
  private _postMessage(msg: BackendMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  /** 读取配置和当前上下文，推送给前端 */
  private async _pushState(): Promise<void> {
    const config = await readConfig(this._context);
    const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    const mdFile = activeEditor?.document?.fileName?.endsWith('.md')
      ? activeEditor.document.fileName
      : null;

    this._postMessage({
      type: 'state',
      config,
      tasks: [],
      mdFile,
      materials: [],
    });
  }

  /** 处理前端消息 */
  private async _handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        await this._pushState();
        break;

      case 'settingsUpdate': {
        if (msg.key === '_openUrl') {
          vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          return;
        }
        await writeConfig(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        this._postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', key: msg.key, value: msg.value });
        break;
      }

      case 'generate':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;

      case 'preview':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;

      case 'materialAdd':
      case 'materialRemove':
      case 'insertMaterial':
        // M4 实现
        break;
    }
  }

  /** 生成 webview HTML */
  private _getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview, nonce: string): string {
    const sidebarUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';
                 style-src 'unsafe-inline' ${webview.cspSource};
                 img-src ${webview.cspSource} https: data:;
                 font-src ${webview.cspSource};
                 connect-src https:;">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { type GenerateRequest, type GenerateResponse, isNanoBanana, isGptImage2, isGptImage2Vip, VIP_DIMENSIONS, IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './shared';

/** 构造请求体：按模型区份尺寸字段 */
function buildRequestBody(req: GenerateRequest): Record<string, unknown> {
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: req.model,
    prompt: req.prompt,
    images: req.images,
    replyType: 'async',
  };

  if (isNanoBanana(req.model)) {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
    body.imageSize = req.imageSize;
  } else if (isGptImage2(req.model)) {
    body.aspectRatio = req.aspectRatio;
  } else if (isGptImage2Vip(req.model)) {
    const dims = VIP_DIMENSIONS[req.aspectRatio];
    if (!dims || !dims[req.imageSize]) {
      throw new Error(`不支持的 vip 像素组合: ${req.aspectRatio} × ${req.imageSize}`);
    }
    body.aspectRatio = dims[req.imageSize];
  }

  return body;
}

/** 运行时校验 API 响应 */
function parseGenerateResponse(data: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) {
    throw new Error('响应不是 JSON 对象');
  }

  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>;

  if (typeof obj.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('响应缺少 id 字段或类型错误');
  }

  const status = obj.status;
  if (status !== 'running' && status !== 'succeeded' && status !== 'failed' && status !== 'violation') {
    throw new Error(`未知的 status 值: ${status}`);
  }

  const resp: GenerateResponse = {
    id: obj.id,
    status,
    error: typeof obj.error === 'string' ? obj.error : undefined,
    progress: typeof obj.progress === 'number' ? obj.progress : undefined,
  };

  if (Array.isArray(obj.results)) {
    resp.results = obj.results.filter(
      (r: unknown) => typeof r === 'object' && r !== null && typeof (r as Record<string, unknown>).url === 'string'
    ) as { url: string }[];
  }

  return resp;
}

/** 异步提交生成请求，返回 job id */
export async function submitGenerate(req: GenerateRequest): Promise<string> {
  const url = `${req.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;
  const body = buildRequestBody(req);

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(url, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${req.apiKey}`,
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      const text = await resp.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}${text ? `: ${text}` : ''}`);
    }

    const data = await resp.json();
    const parsed = parseGenerateResponse(data);

    // async 模式下提交即返回 running+id；若直接返回 failed/violation 则提交失败
    if (parsed.status === 'failed' || parsed.status === 'violation') {
      throw new Error(parsed.error || `提交失败 (${parsed.status})`);
    }

    return parsed.id;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

/** 轮询查询异步任务结果 */
export async function queryResult(id: string, baseUrl: string, apiKey: string): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(id)}`;

  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(url, {
      headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!resp.ok) {
      throw new Error(`API 返回 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
    }

    const data = await resp.json();
    return parseGenerateResponse(data);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

/** 判断是否为可重试的瞬时错误（5xx / 429 / abort / fetch failed） */
export function isTransientError(error: unknown): boolean {
  if (!(error instanceof Error)) return false;
  if (error.name === 'AbortError') return true;
  const msg = error.message;
  // fetch failed（网络层失败）
  if (msg.includes('fetch failed') || msg.includes('Failed to fetch')) return true;
  // HTTP 5xx 或 429
  const match = msg.match(/HTTP (\d+)/);
  if (match) {
    const status = parseInt(match[1], 10);
    return status >= 500 || status === 429;
  }
  return false;
}

/** 从 URL 提取扩展名，校验白名单，否则回退 png */
function extFromUrl(imageUrl: string): string {
  try {
    const urlPath = new URL(imageUrl).pathname;
    const ext = path.extname(urlPath).toLowerCase().replace('.', '');
    if (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number])) {
      return ext;
    }
  } catch {
    // URL 解析失败，回退
  }
  return 'png';
}

/** 下载单张图片到本地 */
export async function downloadImage(imageUrl: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);

  try {
    const resp = await fetch(imageUrl, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!resp.ok) {
      throw new Error(`下载失败 HTTP ${resp.status}`);
    }
    const buf = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());
    fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(destPath), { recursive: true });
    fs.writeFileSync(destPath, buf);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout);
  }
}

/** 下载生成结果列表到任务文件夹，返回接续序号 */
export async function downloadResults(
  results: { url: string }[],
  taskDir: string,
  mdName: string,
  startSeq: number,
): Promise<number> {
  let seq = startSeq;
  for (const r of results) {
    const ext = extFromUrl(r.url);
    const destPath = path.join(taskDir, `${mdName}-${seq}.${ext}`);
    await downloadImage(r.url, destPath);
    seq++;
  }
  return seq;
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { parseAndPrepareRequest } from './parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult, downloadResults, isTransientError } from './api';
import { readConfig } from './config';
import { type TaskRecord, type JobState, IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './shared';

// ---- 模块级状态 ----
const POLL_INTERVAL = 4000; // 4 秒
const TASK_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1000; // 10 分钟
const TASKS_KEY = 'image-flow.tasks';

let _context: vscode.ExtensionContext | null = null;
let _tasks: TaskRecord[] = [];
let _timer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
let _polling = false;
let _sessionStart = Date.now();
let _onChange: ((tasks: TaskRecord[]) => void) | null = null;

// ---- 持久化 ----

function persist(): void {
  if (!_context) return;
  _context.globalState.update(TASKS_KEY, _tasks);
}

function loadPersisted(): TaskRecord[] {
  if (!_context) return [];
  return _context.globalState.get<TaskRecord[]>(TASKS_KEY, []);
}

// ---- 公开接口 ----

/** 初始化任务管理器（扩展激活时调用，含续拉逻辑） */
export function initTaskManager(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  _context = context;
  _sessionStart = Date.now();
  _tasks = loadPersisted();

  // 续拉：submitting 态无 id 的 job 直接判失败
  for (const task of _tasks) {
    for (const job of task.jobs) {
      if (job.status === 'submitting' && !job.id) {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.error = '提交未完成';
      }
    }
  }
  persist();
  notifyChange();

  // 若有 running job，立即拉一次并启动定时器
  if (hasRunningJobs()) {
    pollOnce();
    ensureTimer();
  }
}

/** 获取当前任务列表 */
export function getTasks(): TaskRecord[] {
  return _tasks;
}

/** 注册任务变更回调（侧栏用） */
export function onTasksChange(cb: (tasks: TaskRecord[]) => void): void {
  _onChange = cb;
}

// ---- 生成流程 ----

/** 生成 yyMMddHHmmSS 时间戳 */
function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const y = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const M = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const h = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${M}${d}${h}${m}${s}`;
}

/** 在同目录下创建任务文件夹 task-yyMMddHHmmSS-seq */
function createTaskDir(mdDir: string): string {
  const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    const seqStr = String(seq).padStart(2, '0');
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seqStr}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  fs.mkdirSync(dirPath, { recursive: true });
  return dirPath;
}

/** 获取任务内下一个接续序号 */
function nextSeq(task: TaskRecord): number {
  let count = 0;
  for (const job of task.jobs) {
    count += job.downloadedPaths.length;
  }
  return count + 1;
}

/** 生成图片命令 */
export async function generateImage(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, uri?: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const config = await readConfig(context);

  if (!config.apiKey) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在侧栏设置页填写 API Key');
    return;
  }

  let mdUri = uri;
  if (!mdUri) {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor || !editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }
    mdUri = editor.document.uri;
  }

  const mdPath = mdUri.fsPath;
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
  const mdName = path.basename(mdPath, '.md');

  let content: string;
  try {
    content = fs.readFileSync(mdPath, 'utf-8');
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`读取 Markdown 文件失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  let parsed;
  try {
    parsed = parseAndPrepareRequest(content, mdDir);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`解析 Markdown 失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  let taskDir: string;
  try {
    taskDir = createTaskDir(mdDir);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`创建任务文件夹失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  const concurrency = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, config.concurrency));
  const now = new Date().toISOString();

  // 立即建卡：全部 job 置 submitting 态
  const jobs: JobState[] = Array.from({ length: concurrency }, (_, i) => ({
    index: i,
    status: 'submitting' as const,
    downloadedPaths: [],
  }));

  const task: TaskRecord = { dirPath: taskDir, mdName, model: config.model, jobs, createdAt: now };
  _tasks.push(task);
  persist();
  notifyChange();
  ensureTimer();

  // 后台并发提交
  const submitPromises = jobs.map(async (job) => {
    try {
      const jobId = await submitGenerate({
        model: config.model,
        prompt: parsed.prompt,
        images: parsed.images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
        aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
        imageSize: config.imageSize,
        baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
        apiKey: config.apiKey,
      });
      job.id = jobId;
      job.status = 'running';
    } catch (e) {
      job.status = 'failed';
      job.error = String(e);
    }
    persist();
    notifyChange();
  });

  // 等待全部提交完成以处理「全部失败」的情况
  await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);

  const allFailed = jobs.every((j) => j.status === 'failed');
  if (allFailed) {
    removeTask(task);
    try { fs.rmdirSync(taskDir); } catch { /* 空文件夹清理 */ }
    const errors = [...new Set(jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`提交失败: ${errors}`);
  }
}

// ---- 轮询引擎 ----

/** 是否存在 running 态 job */
function hasRunningJobs(): boolean {
  for (const task of _tasks) {
    for (const job of task.jobs) {
      if (job.status === 'running') return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

/** 确保定时器在运转 */
function ensureTimer(): void {
  if (_timer) return;
  _timer = setInterval(pollOnce, POLL_INTERVAL);
}

/** 停止定时器 */
function stopTimer(): void {
  if (!_timer) return;
  clearInterval(_timer);
  _timer = null;
}

/** 单次轮询（受重入锁保护） */
async function pollOnce(): Promise<void> {
  if (_polling) return;
  _polling = true;

  try {
    const config = await readConfig(_context!);
    const now = Date.now();

    for (const task of _tasks) {
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status !== 'running') continue;

        // 超时兜底：本次会话已超 10 分钟
        if (now - _sessionStart > TASK_TIMEOUT) {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = '任务超时';
          persist();
          notifyChange();
          continue;
        }

        try {
          const result = await queryResult(job.id!, config.baseUrl, config.apiKey);

          if (result.status === 'succeeded') {
            if (result.results && result.results.length > 0) {
              try {
                const seq = nextSeq(task);
                await downloadResults(result.results, task.dirPath, task.mdName, seq);
              } catch (e) {
                // 写盘失败 → 判失败
                job.status = 'failed';
                job.error = String(e);
                persist();
                notifyChange();
                continue;
              }
            }
            job.status = 'succeeded';
            job.progress = 100;
          } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
            job.status = result.status;
            job.error = result.error || `生成失败 (${result.status})`;
          } else {
            // running：更新进度
            job.progress = result.progress;
          }
        } catch (e) {
          if (isTransientError(e)) {
            // 瞬时错误，保持 running，下轮重试
            continue;
          }
          // 不可重试 → 判失败
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = String(e);
        }

        persist();
        notifyChange();
      }

      // 任务终结处理
      if (task.jobs.every((j) => j.status !== 'running' && j.status !== 'submitting')) {
        handleTaskCompletion(task);
      }
    }
  } finally {
    _polling = false;
    // 无 running job 则停定时器
    if (!hasRunningJobs()) {
      stopTimer();
    }
  }
}

// ---- 任务生命周期 ----

function removeTask(task: TaskRecord): void {
  const idx = _tasks.indexOf(task);
  if (idx >= 0) {
    _tasks.splice(idx, 1);
    persist();
    notifyChange();
  }
}

function notifyChange(): void {
  if (_onChange) _onChange(_tasks);
}

/** 任务全部 job 终结后的清理与通知 */
function handleTaskCompletion(task: TaskRecord): void {
  const succeededJobs = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'succeeded');
  const failedJobs = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation');

  // 统计所有已下载图片
  const allImages: string[] = [];
  for (const job of task.jobs) {
    allImages.push(...job.downloadedPaths);
  }

  // 从持久化列表移除
  removeTask(task);

  if (allImages.length === 0) {
    // 无任何成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
    try { fs.rmdirSync(task.dirPath); } catch { /* */ }
    const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 失败: ${errors || '无成图'}`);
  } else if (failedJobs.length > 0) {
    // 有成图但有失败 → 警告通知
    const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
      `任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 部分成功（${allImages.length} 张）。错误: ${errors}`,
    );
  } else {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
      `任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 完成（${allImages.length} 张）`,
    );
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { generateImage, initTaskManager, getTasks, onTasksChange } from './generate';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';
import { seedModelInjections } from './config';

/** 扩展激活 */
export async function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
  // 种入模型注入提示词种子
  await seedModelInjections(context);

  // 初始化任务管理器（含持久化加载与续拉）
  initTaskManager(context);

  // 注册侧栏 Webview Provider
  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context);
  const sidebarRegistration = vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider(
    'image-flow.sidebar',
    sidebarProvider,
  );
  context.subscriptions.push(sidebarRegistration);

  // 注册生成图片命令
  const generateCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
    generateImage(context, uri);
  });
  context.subscriptions.push(generateCmd);

  // 预览请求命令（M5 实现）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本实现');
  });
  context.subscriptions.push(previewCmd);
}

/** 扩展去激活 */
export function deactivate(): void {
  // 清理由 context.subscriptions 自动处理
}

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as crypto from 'crypto';
import { type BackendMessage, type FrontendMessage } from './shared';
import { readConfig, writeConfig } from './config';
import { getTasks, onTasksChange } from './generate';

/** 生成随机 nonce */
function getNonce(): string {
  return crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64');
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;

  constructor(
    private readonly _context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {
    // 任务变更时实时推送给前端
    onTasksChange((tasks) => {
      this._postMessage({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks });
    });
  }

  resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    const webview = webviewView.webview;
    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [
        vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media'),
        ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || []).map((f) => f.uri),
      ],
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    webview.html = this._getHtml(webview, nonce);

    webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: FrontendMessage) => this._handleMessage(msg));

    webviewView.onDidChangeVisibility(() => {
      if (webviewView.visible) {
        this._pushState();
      }
    });
  }

  private _postMessage(msg: BackendMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  private async _pushState(): Promise<void> {
    const config = await readConfig(this._context);
    const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    const mdFile = activeEditor?.document?.fileName?.endsWith('.md')
      ? activeEditor.document.fileName
      : null;

    this._postMessage({
      type: 'state',
      config,
      tasks: getTasks(),
      mdFile,
      materials: [],
    });
  }

  private async _handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        await this._pushState();
        break;

      case 'settingsUpdate': {
        if (msg.key === '_openUrl') {
          vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          return;
        }
        await writeConfig(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        this._postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', key: msg.key, value: msg.value });
        break;
      }

      case 'generate':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;

      case 'preview':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;

      case 'materialAdd':
      case 'materialRemove':
      case 'insertMaterial':
        // M4 实现
        break;
    }
  }

  private _getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview, nonce: string): string {
    const sidebarUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';
                 style-src 'unsafe-inline' ${webview.cspSource};
                 img-src ${webview.cspSource} https: data:;
                 font-src ${webview.cspSource};
                 connect-src https:;">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

```
</details>

> **M3 完成**。compile / check-types / lint 三检全绿。
> 
> ---
> 
> ### M3 实施总结
> 
> **改造文件**（4 个）：
> 
> | 文件 | 变更要点 |
> |------|----------|
> | `src/api.ts` | `replyType` 改为 `'async'`、`submitGenerate` 返回 job id（不再同步等结果）、新增 `queryResult(id, baseUrl, apiKey)` 轮询函数、新增 `isTransientError()` 瞬时错误判定（5xx/429/AbortError/fetch failed → 可重试；其他 → 永久失败） |
> | `src/generate.ts` | **完全重写**为单例任务管理器，核心机制：<br>• **后台并发提交**：立即建 TaskRecord（N 个 job 全 `submitting`）→ 后台 `Promise.allSettled` 发出 N 个 async 请求 → 逐个转 `running`<br>• **单定时器轮询**（4s 间隔，「存在 running job 则运转，无则停」）→ 重入锁 `_polling` → 逐 job 调 `queryResult` → `succeeded` 下载图片（任务内接续编号）→ `failed/violation` 记录错误 → 瞬时错误保持 running 下轮重试<br>• **超时兜底**：10 分钟按「本次会话起算」（`_sessionStart`），关机时长不计入<br>• **持久化**：`globalState` key `image-flow.tasks`，每次状态变更落盘<br>• **续拉**：`initTaskManager()` 加载持久化任务 → `submitting` 无 id → 判「提交未完成」→ 有 running job → 立即拉一次并启动定时器<br>• **全部提交失败**：删任务、删空文件夹、聚合去重错误弹通知<br>• **任务终结**：有成图→警告/无成图→错误、无成图删空文件夹 |
> | `src/extension.ts` | `activate` 中新增 `initTaskManager(context)` 调用（在种入种子之后、注册侧栏之前）；移除未使用的 import |
> | `src/sidebar-provider.ts` | 构造时注册 `onTasksChange` 回调，任务变更实时 `taskUpdate` 推前端；`_pushState` 中 `tasks: getTasks()` 替代硬编码空数组 |
> 
> **M3 后数据流**：
> 
> ```
> 用户点击生成
>   → generateImage()
>     → 解析 MD → 建 task 文件夹 → 建 TaskRecord (N job, submitting)
>     → 入列、持久化、启动定时器
>     → 后台并发 N 个 submitGenerate() (async)
>       → 逐个返回 job id → job 转 running → 持久化
>       → 全失败 → 删任务 + 通知
>   → 定时器 (4s)
>     → pollOnce() 有重入锁
>       → 遍历 running job → queryResult(id)
>         → succeeded → 下载 results → job 转 succeeded
>         → failed/violation → 记录错误
>         → running → 更新 progress
>         → 瞬时错误 → 保持 running 下轮重试
>       → 全部终结 → handleTaskCompletion()
>         → 有成图 → 警告通知 / 无成图 → 错误通知 + 清空文件夹
>         → 从持久化列表移除
>       → 无 running job → stopTimer()
> ```

> ```typescript

>   type: 'auto' | 'manual';
>   images: string[];   // absolute paths to images

> 
> Wait, the spec says:
> - §10.1: "从工作区根的下一层目录起，到 MD 所在目录为止，每一层各成一个库（不含工作区根那层），只取该层目录里直接的图片（不递归）。无图片的层不显示"
> 
> So the auto library is a list of libraries, each representing one directory level. Each library contains DIRECT images only (no subdirectories).
> 
> - §10.2: "每个库递归扫描图片，深度上限 3 层、条目数上限 500"
> 
> Manual libraries are recursive with limits.
> 
> Let me design the auto library scan:
> 
> ```typescript
> function scanAutoMaterials(mdPath: string): MaterialLibrary[] {
>   const workspaceRoot = getWorkspaceRoot(mdPath);
>   if (!workspaceRoot) return [];
>   
>   // Get relative path from workspace root to MD dir
>   const relPath = path.relative(workspaceRoot, path.dirname(mdPath));
>   const parts = relPath.split(path.sep);
>   
>   const libraries: MaterialLibrary[] = [];
>   let currentDir = workspaceRoot;
>   
>   // Skip workspace root itself, start from the next level
>   for (const part of parts) {
>     if (part === '..' || part === '') continue;
>     currentDir = path.join(currentDir, part);
>     
>     const images = getDirectImages(currentDir);
>     if (images.length > 0) {
>       libraries.push({
>         name: part,
>         type: 'auto',
>         images: images,
>       });
>     }
>   }
>   
>   return libraries;
> }
> ```
> 
> Wait, re-reading: "从工作区根的下一层目录起". So if workspace root is `/project`, then first level is `/project/subdir1`. If the MD is at `/project/subdir1/subdir2/file.md`, we'd scan `/project/subdir1` and `/project/subdir1/subdir2`.
> 
> But what if the MD is directly at the workspace root? Then there are no levels between root and MD, so no auto libraries. That makes sense.
> 
> Actually wait, "从工作区根的下一层目录起" means starting from the directory one level below workspace root. So the root itself is excluded, but subdirectories of root are included (up to the MD's dir).
> 
> Let me implement this correctly:
> 
> ```typescript
> function scanAutoMaterials(mdPath: string): { name: string; images: string[] }[] {
>   const workspaceFolders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders;
>   if (!workspaceFolders || workspaceFolders.length === 0) return [];
>   
>   const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
>   
>   // Find which workspace folder contains this MD
>   const wsFolder = workspaceFolders.find(f => mdPath.startsWith(f.uri.fsPath));
>   if (!wsFolder) return [];
>   
>   const wsRoot = wsFolder.uri.fsPath;
>   const relPath = path.relative(wsRoot, mdDir);
>   if (relPath.startsWith('..')) return []; // MD not under workspace root
>   
>   const parts = relPath.split(path.sep).filter(p => p !== '' && p !== '.');
>   const libraries: { name: string; images: string[] }[] = [];
>   let currentDir = wsRoot;
>   
>   for (const part of parts) {
>     currentDir = path.join(currentDir, part);
>     const images = getDirectImages(currentDir);
>     if (images.length > 0) {
>       libraries.push({ name: part, images });
>     }
>   }
>   
>   return libraries;
> }
> ```
> 
> For `getDirectImages(dir)`:
> ```typescript
> function getDirectImages(dir: string): string[] {
>   if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return [];
>   return fs.readdirSync(dir)
>     .filter(f => {
>       const full = path.join(dir, f);
>       if (!fs.statSync(full).isFile()) return false;
>       const ext = path.extname(f).toLowerCase().replace('.', '');
>       return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as any);
>     })
>     .map(f => path.join(dir, f));
> }
> ```

> For manual library scan:
> ```typescript
> function scanManualImages(dir: string): string[] {
>   const results: string[] = [];
>   scanRecursive(dir, 0, results);
>   return results;
> }
> 
> function scanRecursive(dir: string, depth: number, results: string[]): void {
>   if (depth > 3 || results.length >= 500) return;
>   if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return;
>   
>   const entries = fs.readdirSync(dir);
>   for (const entry of entries) {
>     if (results.length >= 500) break;
>     const full = path.join(dir, entry);
>     const stat = fs.statSync(full);
>     
>     if (stat.isDirectory()) {
>       scanRecursive(full, depth + 1, results);
>     } else if (stat.isFile()) {
>       const ext = path.extname(entry).toLowerCase().replace('.', '');
>       if (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as any)) {
>         results.push(full);
>       }
>     }
>   }
> }
> ```

> ```typescript
> const MANUAL_MATERIALS_KEY = 'image-flow.manualMaterials';
> 
> function getManualMaterials(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): string[] {
>   return context.workspaceState.get<string[]>(MANUAL_MATERIALS_KEY, []);
> }
> 
> async function addManualMaterial(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<void> {
>   const folders = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
>     canSelectFolders: true,
>     canSelectFiles: false,
>     canSelectMany: false,
>   });
>   if (!folders || folders.length === 0) return;
>   
>   const dirPath = folders[0].fsPath;
>   const existing = getManualMaterials(context);
>   if (existing.includes(dirPath)) return; // dedup
>   
>   existing.push(dirPath);
>   context.workspaceState.update(MANUAL_MATERIALS_KEY, existing);
> }
> 
> function removeManualMaterial(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, dirPath: string): void {
>   const existing = getManualMaterials(context);
>   const idx = existing.indexOf(dirPath);
>   if (idx >= 0) {
>     existing.splice(idx, 1);
>     context.workspaceState.update(MANUAL_MATERIALS_KEY, existing);
>   }
> }
> ```

> For insert reference:
> ```typescript
> function insertMaterialRef(mdPath: string, imagePath: string): void {
>   const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
>   
>   // Verify active editor IS the effective MD
>   if (!editor || editor.document.uri.fsPath !== mdPath) {
>     vscode.window.showWarningMessage('请先切换到目标 Markdown 文件再插入引用');
>     return;
>   }
>   
>   const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
>   
>   // Compute POSIX style relative path
>   let relPath = path.relative(mdDir, imagePath).replace(/\\/g, '/');
>   
>   // Cross-drive check
>   if (path.isAbsolute(relPath) || relPath.startsWith('..') && relPath.includes(':')) {
>     vscode.window.showWarningMessage('跨盘符无法相对引用');
>     return;
>   }
>   
>   // Add ./ prefix for non-.. paths
>   if (!relPath.startsWith('..')) {
>     relPath = './' + relPath;
>   }
>   
>   // Check for spaces or parens → wrap with <>
>   const needsAngle = /[\s()]/.test(relPath);
>   
>   // alt text = filename without extension
>   const baseName = path.basename(imagePath);
>   const alt = baseName.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
>   
>   const ref = needsAngle
>     ? `![${alt}](<${relPath}>)`
>     : `![${alt}](${relPath})`;
>   
>   // Insert at cursor
>   editor.edit(editBuilder => {
>     editBuilder.insert(editor.selection.active, ref);
>   });
> }
> ```

```typescript
/** 图片扩展名白名单（素材扫描、历史扫描、下载校验、MIME 推断共用） */
export const IMAGE_EXTENSIONS = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg'] as const;

/** 图片 MIME 映射 */
export const IMAGE_MIME_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  png: 'image/png',
  jpg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  gif: 'image/gif',
  webp: 'image/webp',
  bmp: 'image/bmp',
  svg: 'image/svg+xml',
};

/** gpt-image-2-vip 比例+分辨率 → 像素值换算表（两边均为 16 倍数，满足 VIP 约束） */
export const VIP_DIMENSIONS: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': '1024x1024', '2K': '1536x1536', '4K': '2048x2048' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1280x720',  '2K': '1792x1024', '4K': '2560x1440' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '720x1280',  '2K': '1024x1792', '4K': '1440x2560' },
  '4:3':  { '1K': '1152x864',  '2K': '1600x1200', '4K': '2304x1728' },
  '3:4':  { '1K': '864x1152',  '2K': '1200x1600', '4K': '1728x2304' },
};

/** 模型系列判别 */
export function isGptImage2(model: string): boolean {
  return model === 'gpt-image-2';
}

export function isGptImage2Vip(model: string): boolean {
  return model === 'gpt-image-2-vip';
}

export function isNanoBanana(model: string): boolean {
  return model.startsWith('nano-banana');
}

/** 图片引用解析结果 */
export interface ImageRef {
  /** alt 文本 */
  alt: string;
  /** 原始路径（Markdown 中写的路径） */
  rawPath: string;
  /** 去重后的序号（从 1 开始） */
  index: number;
  /** base64 data URI */
  dataUri: string;
}

/** 解析后的 Markdown 内容 */
export interface ParsedContent {
  /** 替换后的正文（图片语法替换为 [imageN](name)） */
  prompt: string;
  /** 去重后的参考图数组 */
  images: ImageRef[];
}

/** API 生成请求参数 */
export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
}

/** API 生成响应 */
export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

/** 任务 job */
export interface JobState {
  /** job 在任务内的序号（0-based） */
  index: number;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  id?: string;
  error?: string;
  progress?: number;
  /** 已下载的本地图片路径数组 */
  downloadedPaths: string[];
}

/** 持久化的任务记录 */
export interface TaskRecord {
  /** 任务文件夹绝对路径 */
  dirPath: string;
  /** Markdown 文件名（不含扩展名） */
  mdName: string;
  /** 模型名 */
  model: string;
  /** 所有 job */
  jobs: JobState[];
  /** 任务真实开始时间（ISO 字符串） */
  createdAt: string;
}

/** 扩展配置 */
export interface ExtensionConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

/** webview postMessage 协议 */
export type FrontendMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'settingsUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'materialAdd' }
  | { type: 'materialRemove'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertMaterial'; imagePath: string };

export type BackendMessage =
  | { type: 'state'; config: ExtensionConfig; tasks: TaskRecord[]; mdFile: string | null; materials: unknown }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskRecord[] }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string };

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { type MaterialLibrary, type MaterialImage, IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './shared';

const MANUAL_KEY = 'image-flow.manualMaterials';

// ---- 公共接口 ----

/** 扫描素材库：自动库（按 MD 路径逐层）+ 手动库 */
export function scanMaterials(
  mdPath: string | null,
  webview: vscode.Webview,
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
): MaterialLibrary[] {
  const libs: MaterialLibrary[] = [];

  // 自动库
  if (mdPath) {
    libs.push(...scanAutoMaterials(mdPath, webview));
  }

  // 手动库
  const manualPaths = getManualPaths(context);
  for (const dirPath of manualPaths) {
    const lib = scanManualLibrary(dirPath, webview);
    if (lib) libs.push(lib);
  }

  return libs;
}

/** 获取 localResourceRoots（供 webview 设置用） */
export function buildLocalResourceRoots(
  extensionUri: vscode.Uri,
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
): vscode.Uri[] {
  const roots: vscode.Uri[] = [
    vscode.Uri.joinPath(extensionUri, 'media'),
    ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || []).map((f) => f.uri),
  ];
  for (const dirPath of getManualPaths(context)) {
    roots.push(vscode.Uri.file(dirPath));
  }
  return roots;
}

// ---- 手动素材库路径管理 ----

export function getManualPaths(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): string[] {
  return context.workspaceState.get<string[]>(MANUAL_KEY, []);
}

export async function addManualPath(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string | null> {
  const folders = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
    canSelectFolders: true,
    canSelectFiles: false,
    canSelectMany: false,
    openLabel: '添加素材库',
  });
  if (!folders || folders.length === 0) return null;

  const dirPath = folders[0].fsPath;
  const existing = getManualPaths(context);
  if (existing.includes(dirPath)) return dirPath; // 去重

  existing.push(dirPath);
  await context.workspaceState.update(MANUAL_KEY, existing);
  return dirPath;
}

export async function removeManualPath(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, dirPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const existing = getManualPaths(context);
  const idx = existing.indexOf(dirPath);
  if (idx < 0) return;
  existing.splice(idx, 1);
  await context.workspaceState.update(MANUAL_KEY, existing);
}

// ---- 插入引用 ----

/** 把图片以相对路径 Markdown 引用插入当前编辑器光标处 */
export function insertMaterialRef(mdPath: string, imagePath: string): void {
  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;

  // 校验活动编辑器正是生效 MD
  if (!editor || editor.document.uri.fsPath !== mdPath) {
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage('请先切换到目标 Markdown 文件再插入引用');
    return;
  }

  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);

  // POSIX 风格相对路径
  let relPath = path.relative(mdDir, imagePath).replace(/\\/g, '/');

  // 跨盘符检测
  if (path.isAbsolute(relPath)) {
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage('跨盘符无法相对引用');
    return;
  }

  // 非 .. 开头加 ./
  if (!relPath.startsWith('..')) {
    relPath = './' + relPath;
  }

  // 路径含空格或半角括号用 <> 包裹
  const needsAngle = /[\s()]/.test(relPath);

  // alt = 文件名去扩展名
  const baseName = path.basename(imagePath);
  const alt = baseName.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');

  const ref = needsAngle
    ? `![${alt}](<${relPath}>)`
    : `![${alt}](${relPath})`;

  editor.edit((eb) => {
    eb.insert(editor.selection.active, ref);
  });
}

// ---- 内部扫描函数 ----

/** 按生效 MD 路径逐层生成自动素材库：从工作区根下一层到 MD 所在目录，每层取直接图片 */
function scanAutoMaterials(mdPath: string, webview: vscode.Webview): MaterialLibrary[] {
  const wsFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(vscode.Uri.file(mdPath));
  if (!wsFolder) return [];

  const wsRoot = wsFolder.uri.fsPath;
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
  const relPath = path.relative(wsRoot, mdDir);
  if (relPath.startsWith('..') || relPath === '') return [];

  const parts = relPath.split(path.sep).filter((p) => p !== '' && p !== '.');
  const libs: MaterialLibrary[] = [];
  let currentDir = wsRoot;

  for (const part of parts) {
    currentDir = path.join(currentDir, part);
    const images = scanDirectImages(currentDir, webview);
    if (images.length > 0) {
      libs.push({ name: part, type: 'auto', path: currentDir, images });
    }
  }

  return libs;
}

/** 扫描单层目录里的直接图片（不递归） */
function scanDirectImages(dir: string, webview: vscode.Webview): MaterialImage[] {
  if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return [];

  const results: MaterialImage[] = [];
  let entries: fs.Dirent[];
  try {
    entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch {
    return [];
  }

  for (const entry of entries) {
    if (!entry.isFile()) continue;
    const ext = path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase().replace('.', '');
    if (!IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number])) continue;

    const fsPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);
    results.push({
      fsPath,
      webviewUri: webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(fsPath)).toString(),
    });
  }

  return results;
}

/** 扫描手动素材库：递归，深度 ≤3，条目 ≤500 */
function scanManualLibrary(dirPath: string, webview: vscode.Webview): MaterialLibrary | null {
  const images: MaterialImage[] = [];
  scanRecursive(dirPath, 0, images, webview);
  if (images.length === 0) return null;

  return {
    name: path.basename(dirPath),
    type: 'manual',
    path: dirPath,
    images,
  };
}

function scanRecursive(dir: string, depth: number, images: MaterialImage[], webview: vscode.Webview): void {
  if (depth > 3 || images.length >= 500) return;
  if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return;

  let entries: fs.Dirent[];
  try {
    entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch {
    return;
  }

  for (const entry of entries) {
    if (images.length >= 500) break;
    const full = path.join(dir, entry.name);

    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      scanRecursive(full, depth + 1, images, webview);
    } else if (entry.isFile()) {
      const ext = path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase().replace('.', '');
      if (!IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as typeof IMAGE_EXTENSIONS[number])) continue;

      images.push({
        fsPath: full,
        webviewUri: webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(full)).toString(),
      });
    }
  }
}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as crypto from 'crypto';
import { type BackendMessage, type FrontendMessage } from './shared';
import { readConfig, writeConfig } from './config';
import { getTasks, onTasksChange } from './generate';
import { scanMaterials, buildLocalResourceRoots, getManualPaths, addManualPath, removeManualPath, insertMaterialRef } from './material';

/** 生成随机 nonce */
function getNonce(): string {
  return crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64');
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMdPath: string | null = null;

  constructor(
    private readonly _context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {
    // 任务变更实时推送
    onTasksChange((tasks) => {
      this._postMessage({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks });
    });
  }

  resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _resolveCtx: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    const webview = webviewView.webview;
    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: buildLocalResourceRoots(this._context.extensionUri, this._context),
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    webview.html = this._getHtml(webview, nonce);

    webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: FrontendMessage) => this._handleMessage(msg));

    webviewView.onDidChangeVisibility(() => {
      if (webviewView.visible) {
        this._pushState();
      }
    });
  }

  /** 素材库变更后刷新 localResourceRoots */
  private _refreshRoots(): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    this._view.webview.options = {
      ...this._view.webview.options,
      localResourceRoots: buildLocalResourceRoots(this._context.extensionUri, this._context),
    };
  }

  private _postMessage(msg: BackendMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  private async _pushState(): Promise<void> {
    const config = await readConfig(this._context);
    const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    const mdFile = activeEditor?.document?.fileName?.endsWith('.md')
      ? activeEditor.document.fileName
      : null;

    this._currentMdPath = mdFile;

    const materials = mdFile && this._view
      ? scanMaterials(mdFile, this._view.webview, this._context)
      : [];

    this._postMessage({
      type: 'state',
      config,
      tasks: getTasks(),
      mdFile,
      materials,
    });
  }

  private async _pushMaterials(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this._currentMdPath || !this._view) return;
    const materials = scanMaterials(this._currentMdPath, this._view.webview, this._context);
    this._postMessage({ type: 'materialsUpdate', materials });
  }

  private async _handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        await this._pushState();
        break;

      case 'settingsUpdate': {
        if (msg.key === '_openUrl') {
          vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          return;
        }
        await writeConfig(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        this._postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', key: msg.key, value: msg.value });
        break;
      }

      case 'generate':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;

      case 'preview':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;

      case 'materialAdd': {
        const added = await addManualPath(this._context);
        if (added) {
          this._refreshRoots();
          await this._pushMaterials();
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'materialRemove': {
        await removeManualPath(this._context, msg.path);
        this._refreshRoots();
        await this._pushMaterials();
        break;
      }

      case 'insertMaterial': {
        if (!this._currentMdPath) {
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        insertMaterialRef(this._currentMdPath, msg.imagePath);
        break;
      }

      case 'openMaterial': {
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', vscode.Uri.file(msg.imagePath));
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  private _getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview, nonce: string): string {
    const sidebarUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';
                 style-src 'unsafe-inline' ${webview.cspSource};
                 img-src ${webview.cspSource} https: data:;
                 font-src ${webview.cspSource};
                 connect-src https:;">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}
```

```typescript
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';

// ---- VSCode Webview API ----
declare function acquireVsCodeApi(): {
  postMessage(msg: unknown): void;
  getState(): unknown;
  setState(state: unknown): void;
};
const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi();

// ---- 类型 ----
interface ExtensionConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

interface StateMessage {
  type: 'state';
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  tasks: unknown[];
  mdFile: string | null;
  materials: unknown[];
}

interface ConfigUpdateMessage {
  type: 'configUpdate';
  key: string;
  value: unknown;
}

type BackendMessage = StateMessage | ConfigUpdateMessage | { type: 'error'; message: string };

// ---- 常量 ----
const MODEL_OPTIONS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];
const RATIO_OPTIONS = ['1:1', '16:9', '9:16', '4:3', '3:4'];
const SIZE_OPTIONS = ['1K', '2K', '4K'];
const NODE_OPTIONS = [
  { label: '国内节点', value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' },
  { label: '全球节点', value: 'https://grsaiapi.com' },
];

function defaultConfig(): ExtensionConfig {
  return {
    apiKey: '',
    baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
    model: 'nano-banana-2',
    aspectRatio: '3:4',
    imageSize: '1K',
    concurrency: 1,
    workbenchCols: 4,
    tasksCols: 2,
    modelInjections: {},
  };
}

// ---- App 根组件 ----
function App() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<ExtensionConfig>(defaultConfig);
  const [mdFile, setMdFile] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ message: string; isError: boolean }>({ message: '', isError: false });
  const [injectionModel, setInjectionModel] = useState(config.model);

  // 监听来自后端的消息
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent) => {
      const msg = e.data as BackendMessage;
      if (!msg || typeof msg.type !== 'string') return;

      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'state': {
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setMdFile(msg.mdFile);
          setInjectionModel(msg.config.model);
          break;
        }
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, [msg.key]: msg.value }));
          break;
        case 'error':
          setStatus({ message: msg.message, isError: true });
          break;
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    // 挂载后发送 init 请求当前状态
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  // 发送配置变更
  const updateSetting = useCallback((key: string, value: unknown) => {
    setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, [key]: value }));
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'settingsUpdate', key, value });
  }, []);

  // 模型注入句更新
  const updateInjection = useCallback((model: string, text: string) => {
    const updated = { ...config.modelInjections, [model]: text };
    updateSetting('modelInjections', updated);
  }, [config.modelInjections, updateSetting]);

  // 触发生成
  const handleGenerate = useCallback(() => {
    setStatus({ message: '正在提交…', isError: false });
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  }, []);

  // 触发预览
  const handlePreview = useCallback(() => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'preview' });
  }, []);

  const mdDisplayName = mdFile
    ? mdFile.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || mdFile
    : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  return (
    <Tabs.Root className="tabs-root" defaultValue="workbench">
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">工作台</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">任务</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">设置</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          mdDisplayName={mdDisplayName}
          status={status}
          onUpdateSetting={updateSetting}
          onGenerate={handleGenerate}
          onPreview={handlePreview}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab
          config={config}
          injectionModel={injectionModel}
          onInjectionModelChange={setInjectionModel}
          onUpdateSetting={updateSetting}
          onUpdateInjection={updateInjection}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

// ---- 工作台标签页 ----
function WorkbenchTab({
  config,
  mdDisplayName,
  status,
  onUpdateSetting,
  onGenerate,
  onPreview,
}: {
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  mdDisplayName: string;
  status: { message: string; isError: boolean };
  onUpdateSetting: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
  onPreview: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div>
      {/* 素材库区 —— M4 实现 */}
      <div className="material-placeholder">素材库（将在后续版本实现）</div>

      {/* 底部停靠区 */}
      <div className="workbench-bottom">
        {/* 控件行 */}
        <div className="workbench-controls">
          <select
            value={config.model}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('model', e.target.value)}
          >
            {MODEL_OPTIONS.map((m) => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select
            value={config.imageSize}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('imageSize', e.target.value)}
          >
            {SIZE_OPTIONS.map((s) => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select
            value={config.aspectRatio}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}
          >
            {RATIO_OPTIONS.map((r) => <option key={r} value={r}>{r}</option>)}
          </select>
          <input
            type="number"
            min={1}
            max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('concurrency', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1)}
          />
        </div>

        {/* 生成行 */}
        <div className="generate-row">
          <span className="md-name">{mdDisplayName}</span>
          <button onClick={onPreview}>预览请求</button>
          <button onClick={onGenerate}>生成</button>
        </div>

        {/* 状态行 */}
        <div className={`status-row ${status.isError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
          {status.message}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 任务标签页 ----
function TasksTab() {
  return (
    <div className="task-placeholder">
      暂无任务。在 Markdown 文件中右键或使用工作台按钮开始生成。
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 设置标签页 ----
function SettingsTab({
  config,
  injectionModel,
  onInjectionModelChange,
  onUpdateSetting,
  onUpdateInjection,
}: {
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  injectionModel: string;
  onInjectionModelChange: (model: string) => void;
  onUpdateSetting: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onUpdateInjection: (model: string, text: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div>
      {/* API Key */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">API Key</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <input
            type="password"
            className="grow"
            value={config.apiKey}
            placeholder="sk-xxxxxxxx"
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('apiKey', e.target.value)}
          />
        </div>
        <a
          className="link"
          onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'settingsUpdate', key: '_openUrl', value: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' })}
        >
          获取 API Key →
        </a>
      </div>

      {/* 节点 */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">API 节点</div>
        <select
          value={config.baseUrl}
          onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('baseUrl', e.target.value)}
        >
          {NODE_OPTIONS.map((n) => <option key={n.value} value={n.value}>{n.label}</option>)}
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* 显示设置 */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">显示</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>工作台列数</label>
          <input
            type="number"
            className="grow"
            min={1}
            max={8}
            value={config.workbenchCols}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('workbenchCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 4)}
          />
        </div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>任务列数</label>
          <input
            type="number"
            className="grow"
            min={1}
            max={8}
            value={config.tasksCols}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('tasksCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 2)}
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 模型注入提示词 */}
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">模型注入提示词</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>模型</label>
          <select
            className="grow"
            value={injectionModel}
            onChange={(e) => onInjectionModelChange(e.target.value)}
          >
            {MODEL_OPTIONS.map((m) => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
        <textarea
          value={config.modelInjections[injectionModel] || ''}
          placeholder="输入该模型的注入提示词（留空则不注入）"
          onChange={(e) => onUpdateInjection(injectionModel, e.target.value)}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// 挂载 React 根节点
const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');
if (rootEl) {
  createRoot(rootEl).render(<App />);
}
```

```typescript
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';

// ---- VSCode Webview API ----
declare function acquireVsCodeApi(): {
  postMessage(msg: unknown): void;
  getState(): unknown;
  setState(state: unknown): void;
};
const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi();

// ---- 类型 ----
interface ExtensionConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

interface MaterialImage {
  webviewUri: string;
  fsPath: string;
}

interface MaterialLibrary {
  name: string;
  type: 'auto' | 'manual';
  path: string;
  images: MaterialImage[];
}

interface StateMessage {
  type: 'state';
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  tasks: unknown[];
  mdFile: string | null;
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
}

interface ConfigUpdateMessage {
  type: 'configUpdate';
  key: string;
  value: unknown;
}

interface MaterialsUpdateMessage {
  type: 'materialsUpdate';
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
}

type BackendMessage =
  | StateMessage
  | ConfigUpdateMessage
  | MaterialsUpdateMessage
  | { type: 'error'; message: string };

// ---- 常量 ----
const MODEL_OPTIONS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];
const RATIO_OPTIONS = ['1:1', '16:9', '9:16', '4:3', '3:4'];
const SIZE_OPTIONS = ['1K', '2K', '4K'];
const NODE_OPTIONS = [
  { label: '国内节点', value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' },
  { label: '全球节点', value: 'https://grsaiapi.com' },
];

function defaultConfig(): ExtensionConfig {
  return {
    apiKey: '',
    baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
    model: 'nano-banana-2',
    aspectRatio: '3:4',
    imageSize: '1K',
    concurrency: 1,
    workbenchCols: 4,
    tasksCols: 2,
    modelInjections: {},
  };
}

// ---- App 根组件 ----
function App() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<ExtensionConfig>(defaultConfig);
  const [mdFile, setMdFile] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [materials, setMaterials] = useState<MaterialLibrary[]>([]);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ message: string; isError: boolean }>({ message: '', isError: false });
  const [injectionModel, setInjectionModel] = useState(config.model);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent) => {
      const msg = e.data as BackendMessage;
      if (!msg || typeof msg.type !== 'string') return;

      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'state': {
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setMdFile(msg.mdFile);
          setMaterials(msg.materials);
          setInjectionModel(msg.config.model);
          break;
        }
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, [msg.key]: msg.value }));
          break;
        case 'materialsUpdate':
          setMaterials(msg.materials);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setStatus({ message: msg.message, isError: true });
          break;
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const updateSetting = useCallback((key: string, value: unknown) => {
    setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, [key]: value }));
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'settingsUpdate', key, value });
  }, []);

  const updateInjection = useCallback((model: string, text: string) => {
    const updated = { ...config.modelInjections, [model]: text };
    updateSetting('modelInjections', updated);
  }, [config.modelInjections, updateSetting]);

  const handleGenerate = useCallback(() => {
    setStatus({ message: '正在提交…', isError: false });
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  }, []);

  const handlePreview = useCallback(() => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'preview' });
  }, []);

  const mdDisplayName = mdFile
    ? mdFile.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || mdFile
    : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  return (
    <Tabs.Root className="tabs-root" defaultValue="workbench">
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">工作台</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">任务</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">设置</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          mdDisplayName={mdDisplayName}
          materials={materials}
          status={status}
          onUpdateSetting={updateSetting}
          onGenerate={handleGenerate}
          onPreview={handlePreview}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab
          config={config}
          injectionModel={injectionModel}
          onInjectionModelChange={setInjectionModel}
          onUpdateSetting={updateSetting}
          onUpdateInjection={updateInjection}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

// ---- 素材库区组件 ----
function MaterialSection({ libraries, cols }: { libraries: MaterialLibrary[]; cols: number }) {
  const handleOpen = (fsPath: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'openMaterial', imagePath: fsPath });
  };

  const handleInsert = (e: React.MouseEvent, fsPath: string) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'insertMaterial', imagePath: fsPath });
  };

  const handleRemove = (libPath: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'materialRemove', path: libPath });
  };

  return (
    <div className="materials-area">
      {libraries.map((lib) => (
        <div key={lib.path} className="material-library">
          <div className="library-header">
            <span className="library-name">
              {lib.type === 'auto' ? `当前路径 / ${lib.name}` : lib.name}
            </span>
            {lib.type === 'manual' && (
              <button className="library-remove" onClick={() => handleRemove(lib.path)} title="移除此素材库">
                ×
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
          <div
            className="material-grid"
            style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)` }}
          >
            {lib.images.map((img) => (
              <img
                key={img.fsPath}
                className="material-thumb"
                src={img.webviewUri}
                onClick={() => handleOpen(img.fsPath)}
                onContextMenu={(e) => handleInsert(e, img.fsPath)}
                title="左键打开 · 右键插入引用"
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
      <button
        className="material-add-btn"
        onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'materialAdd' })}
      >
        + 添加素材库
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 工作台标签页 ----
function WorkbenchTab({
  config,
  mdDisplayName,
  materials,
  status,
  onUpdateSetting,
  onGenerate,
  onPreview,
}: {
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  mdDisplayName: string;
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
  status: { message: string; isError: boolean };
  onUpdateSetting: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
  onPreview: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div>
      {/* 素材库区 */}
      {materials.length > 0 ? (
        <MaterialSection libraries={materials} cols={config.workbenchCols} />
      ) : (
        <div className="material-placeholder">
          {mdDisplayName === '未打开 Markdown 文件'
            ? '打开 Markdown 文件以显示素材库'
            : '当前路径无图片，添加手动素材库开始'}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 底部停靠区 */}
      <div className="workbench-bottom">
        <div className="workbench-controls">
          <select value={config.model} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('model', e.target.value)}>
            {MODEL_OPTIONS.map((m) => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={config.imageSize} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('imageSize', e.target.value)}>
            {SIZE_OPTIONS.map((s) => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={config.aspectRatio} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}>
            {RATIO_OPTIONS.map((r) => <option key={r} value={r}>{r}</option>)}
          </select>
          <input
            type="number"
            min={1} max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('concurrency', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1)}
          />
        </div>

        <div className="generate-row">
          <span className="md-name">{mdDisplayName}</span>
          <button onClick={onPreview}>预览请求</button>
          <button onClick={onGenerate}>生成</button>
        </div>

        <div className={`status-row ${status.isError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
          {status.message}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 任务标签页 ----
function TasksTab() {
  return (
    <div className="task-placeholder">
      暂无任务。在 Markdown 文件中右键或使用工作台按钮开始生成。
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 设置标签页 ----
function SettingsTab({
  config,
  injectionModel,
  onInjectionModelChange,
  onUpdateSetting,
  onUpdateInjection,
}: {
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  injectionModel: string;
  onInjectionModelChange: (model: string) => void;
  onUpdateSetting: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onUpdateInjection: (model: string, text: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div>
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">API Key</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <input
            type="password"
            className="grow"
            value={config.apiKey}
            placeholder="sk-xxxxxxxx"
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('apiKey', e.target.value)}
          />
        </div>
        <a
          className="link"
          onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'settingsUpdate', key: '_openUrl', value: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' })}
        >
          获取 API Key →
        </a>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">API 节点</div>
        <select value={config.baseUrl} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('baseUrl', e.target.value)}>
          {NODE_OPTIONS.map((n) => <option key={n.value} value={n.value}>{n.label}</option>)}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">显示</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>工作台列数</label>
          <input
            type="number" className="grow" min={1} max={8}
            value={config.workbenchCols}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('workbenchCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 4)}
          />
        </div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>任务列数</label>
          <input
            type="number" className="grow" min={1} max={8}
            value={config.tasksCols}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('tasksCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 2)}
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">模型注入提示词</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>模型</label>
          <select className="grow" value={injectionModel} onChange={(e) => onInjectionModelChange(e.target.value)}>
            {MODEL_OPTIONS.map((m) => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
        <textarea
          value={config.modelInjections[injectionModel] || ''}
          placeholder="输入该模型的注入提示词（留空则不注入）"
          onChange={(e) => onUpdateInjection(injectionModel, e.target.value)}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// 挂载 React 根节点
const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');
if (rootEl) {
  createRoot(rootEl).render(<App />);
}
```
