```css
/* 全局 reset */
* {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

:root {
  --gap: 8px;
  --radius: 4px;
}

body {
  padding: 0;
  color: var(--vscode-foreground);
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family);
  font-size: var(--vscode-font-size);
  background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background);
}

/* ---- Tabs ---- */
.tabs-root {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100vh;
}

.tabs-list {
  display: flex;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  background: var(--vscode-sideBar-background);
}

.tabs-trigger {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 6px 0;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--vscode-disabledForeground);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
}

.tabs-trigger:hover {
  color: var(--vscode-foreground);
}

.tabs-trigger[data-state="active"] {
  color: var(--vscode-foreground);
  border-bottom-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder);
}

.tabs-content {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  padding: var(--gap);
}

/* ---- 通用控件 ---- */
.section {
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.section-title {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--vscode-disabledForeground);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.form-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: var(--gap);
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.form-row > label {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  min-width: 48px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--vscode-disabledForeground);
}

.form-row > .grow {
  flex: 1;
}

select,
input[type="number"],
input[type="password"],
textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 4px 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  outline: none;
}

select:focus,
input:focus,
textarea:focus {
  border-color: var(--vscode-focusBorder);
}

textarea {
  resize: vertical;
  min-height: 60px;
}

button {
  padding: 4px 12px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family);
  color: var(--vscode-button-foreground);
  background: var(--vscode-button-background);
  border: none;
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  cursor: pointer;
}

button:hover {
  background: var(--vscode-button-hoverBackground);
}

button:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.link {
  color: var(--vscode-textLink-foreground);
  font-size: 11px;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.link:hover {
  color: var(--vscode-textLink-activeForeground);
}

/* ---- 工作台 ---- */
.workbench-bottom {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border);
  padding-top: var(--gap);
  margin-top: var(--gap);
}

.workbench-controls {
  display: flex;
  gap: var(--gap);
  margin-bottom: var(--gap);
}

.workbench-controls > * {
  flex: 1;
}

.generate-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: var(--gap);
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: var(--gap);
}

.generate-row .md-name {
  flex: 1;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--vscode-disabledForeground);
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.generate-row button {
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.status-row {
  font-size: 11px;
  min-height: 16px;
}

.status-row.error {
  color: var(--vscode-errorForeground);
}

/* ---- 任务页 ---- */
.task-placeholder {
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--vscode-disabledForeground);
  padding: 24px 0;
  font-size: 12px;
}

/* ---- 设置页 ---- */
.settings-section {
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  padding-bottom: 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--vscode-panel-border);
}

.settings-section:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

/* ---- 素材库 placeholder ---- */
.material-placeholder {
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--vscode-disabledForeground);
  padding: 16px 0;
  font-size: 12px;
  border: 1px dashed var(--vscode-panel-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
}
```

> | `src/sidebar-provider.ts` | 串入素材库消息路由：`materialAdd` → 系统文件选择器 → `workspaceState` 去重写入 → 刷新 `localResourceRoots` → 推送 `materialsUpdate`；`materialRemove` → 移出 `workspaceState` → 刷新 roots → 推送更新；`insertMaterial` → 调 `insertMaterialRef`（光标处插入相对引用）；`openMaterial` → `vscode.open` 打开原图；`_pushState` 中调用 `scanMaterials` 组装素材数据 |
> | `media/sidebar.tsx` | 工作台页素材库区由占位符替换为完整 `MaterialSection` 组件：自动库显示「当前路径 / 层级名」、手动库显示目录名 + × 移除按钮；缩略图网格列数跟随 `workbenchCols` 配置；左键 `openMaterial` / 右键 `insertMaterial`；底部「+ 添加素材库」按钮 |
> 
> **素材库模块核心函数**：
> 
> | 函数 | 功能 |
> |------|------|
> | `scanMaterials(mdPath, webview, context)` | 聚合自动 + 手动素材库，所有图片路径经 `asWebviewUri` 转换 |
> | `scanAutoMaterials` | 从工作区根下一层到 MD 所在目录，逐层取直接图片（不递归），无图片层跳过 |
> | `scanManualLibrary` | 递归扫描（深度 ≤3、条目 ≤500），图片白名单过滤 |
> | `getManualPaths` / `addManualPath` / `removeManualPath` | 手动库路径 `workspaceState` 增删查，`add` 弹系统文件夹选择器 + 去重 |
> | `insertMaterialRef(mdPath, imagePath)` | 校验活动编辑器 == 生效 MD → POSIX 相对路径 → 非 `..` 加 `./` → 含空格/括号时 `<>` 包裹 → alt 取文件名去扩展名 → `editor.edit` 插入光标处 |
> | `buildLocalResourceRoots` | 聚合 media + 工作区 + 全部手动库目录，供 webview `localResourceRoots` 设置 |
> 
> **左右键交互**：左键 → `vscode.open` 打开原图；右键 → 拼接 `![alt](<path>)` 引用（含 `<>` 包裹与 M1 parser 的 `<>` 解包两端兼容）插入光标处。

```typescript
  };
```

```typescript
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');

  const mdPath = mdUri.fsPath;
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
  const mdName = path.basename(mdPath, '.md');

  let content: string;
  try {
    content = fs.readFileSync(mdPath, 'utf-8');
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`读取 Markdown 文件失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  let parsed;
  try {
    parsed = parseAndPrepareRequest(content, mdDir);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`解析 Markdown 失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  let taskDir: string;
  try {
    taskDir = createTaskDir(mdDir);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`创建任务文件夹失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  const concurrency = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, config.concurrency));
  const now = new Date().toISOString();

  // 立即建卡：全部 job 置 submitting 态
  const jobs: JobState[] = Array.from({ length: concurrency }, (_, i) => ({
    index: i,
    status: 'submitting' as const,
    downloadedPaths: [],
  }));

  const task: TaskRecord = { dirPath: taskDir, mdName, model: config.model, jobs, createdAt: now };
  _tasks.push(task);
  persist();
  notifyChange();
  ensureTimer();

  // 后台并发提交
```

```typescript
  // 后台并发提交
  const submitPromises = jobs.map(async (job) => {
    try {
      const jobId = await submitGenerate({
        model: config.model,
        prompt: parsed.prompt,
        images: parsed.images.map((img) => img.dataUri),

        baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
        apiKey: config.apiKey,
      });
      job.id = jobId;
      job.status = 'running';
    } catch (e) {
      job.status = 'failed';
      job.error = String(e);
    }
    persist();
    notifyChange();
  });

  await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { assemblePrompt } from './prompt';
import { buildRequestBody } from './api';
import { readConfig } from './config';

/** 预览请求：与真实提交共用解析与请求体构造，不调 API */
export async function previewRequest(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, uri?: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const config = await readConfig(context);

  // 确定目标 Markdown 文件
  let mdUri = uri;
  if (!mdUri) {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor || !editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }
    mdUri = editor.document.uri;
  }

  const mdPath = mdUri.fsPath;
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);

  // 读取 Markdown
  let content: string;
  try {
    content = fs.readFileSync(mdPath, 'utf-8');
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`读取 Markdown 文件失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  // 解析 + 拼装提示词（与 generate 走同一 assemblePrompt）
  let parsed;
  try {
    parsed = assemblePrompt(content, mdDir, config);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`解析 Markdown 失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  // 构造请求体（与 generate 走同一 buildRequestBody）
  const body = buildRequestBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt: parsed.prompt,
    images: parsed.images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
    baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
    apiKey: config.apiKey,
  });

  // 请求参数剔除 prompt/images/replyType（避免长 base64 刷屏）
  const slimParams: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(body)) {
    if (k === 'prompt' || k === 'images' || k === 'replyType') continue;
    slimParams[k] = v;
  }

  // 参考图概览
  let imagesOverview: string;
  if (parsed.images.length === 0) {
    imagesOverview = '无参考图';
  } else {
    imagesOverview = parsed.images
      .map((img) => {
        const preview = img.dataUri.slice(0, 48);
        const total = img.dataUri.length;
        return `image${img.index}: ${preview}…（${total} 字符）`;
      })
      .join('\n');
  }

  // 组装预览文档内容
  const docContent = [
    '最终提示词',
    '==========',
    parsed.prompt,
    '',
    '请求地址',
    '==========',
    `POST ${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`,
    '',
    '请求参数',
    '==========',
    JSON.stringify(slimParams, null, 2),
    '',
    '参考图概览',
    '==========',
    imagesOverview,
  ].join('\n');

  // 打开预览文档
  const document = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({
    content: docContent,
    language: 'plaintext',
  });
  await vscode.window.showTextDocument(document);
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { assemblePrompt } from './prompt';
import { buildRequestBody } from './api';
import { readConfig } from './config';

/** 预览请求：与真实提交共用解析与请求体构造，不调 API */
export async function previewRequest(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, uri?: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const config = await readConfig(context);

  // 确定目标 Markdown 文件
  let mdUri = uri;
  if (!mdUri) {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor || !editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }
    mdUri = editor.document.uri;
  }

  const mdPath = mdUri.fsPath;
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);

  // 读取 Markdown
  let content: string;
  try {
    content = fs.readFileSync(mdPath, 'utf-8');
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`读取 Markdown 文件失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  // 解析 + 拼装提示词（与 generate 走同一 assemblePrompt）
  let parsed;
  try {
    parsed = assemblePrompt(content, mdDir, config);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`解析 Markdown 失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  // 构造请求体（与 generate 走同一 buildRequestBody）
  const body = buildRequestBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt: parsed.prompt,
    images: parsed.images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
    baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
    apiKey: config.apiKey,
  });

  // 请求参数剔除 prompt/images/replyType（避免长 base64 刷屏）
  const slimParams: Record<string, unknown> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(body)) {
    if (k === 'prompt' || k === 'images' || k === 'replyType') continue;
    slimParams[k] = v;
  }

  // 参考图概览
  let imagesOverview: string;
  if (parsed.images.length === 0) {
    imagesOverview = '无参考图';
  } else {
    imagesOverview = parsed.images
      .map((img) => {
        const preview = img.dataUri.slice(0, 48);
        const total = img.dataUri.length;
        return `image${img.index}: ${preview}…（${total} 字符）`;
      })
      .join('\n');
  }

  // 组装预览文档内容
  const docContent = [
    '最终提示词',
    '==========',
    parsed.prompt,
    '',
    '请求地址',
    '==========',
    `POST ${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`,
    '',
    '请求参数',
    '==========',
    JSON.stringify(slimParams, null, 2),
    '',
    '参考图概览',
    '==========',
    imagesOverview,
  ].join('\n');

  // 打开预览文档
  const document = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({
    content: docContent,
    language: 'plaintext',
  });
  await vscode.window.showTextDocument(document);
}

```
</details>

```typescript
import * as fs from 'fs';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { parseAndPrepareRequest } from './parser';
import { type ExtensionConfig, type ParsedContent } from './shared';

/**
 * 组装最终提示词：模型注入句 + IMAGES.md + 替换后正文
 * 按此固定顺序空行连接，空段省略。提交与预览必须走此同一拼装逻辑。
 */
export function assemblePrompt(content: string, mdDir: string, mdPath: string, config: ExtensionConfig): ParsedContent {
  const parsed = parseAndPrepareRequest(content, mdDir);

  const parts: string[] = [];

  // 1. 模型注入句（配置中该模型的注入文本，为空则跳过）
  const injection = config.modelInjections[config.model];
  if (injection && injection.trim()) {
    parts.push(injection.trim());
  }

  // 2. 工作区根目录 IMAGES.md 全文（不存在/为空/无工作区均静默跳过）
  const wsFolder = vscode.workspace.getWorkspaceFolder(vscode.Uri.file(mdPath));
  if (wsFolder) {
    const imagesMdPath = path.join(wsFolder.uri.fsPath, 'IMAGES.md');
    try {
      const imagesMdContent = fs.readFileSync(imagesMdPath, 'utf-8').trim();
      if (imagesMdContent) {
        parts.push(imagesMdContent);
      }
    } catch {
      // 文件不存在或读取失败，静默跳过
    }
  }

  // 3. 替换后的正文
  parts.push(parsed.prompt);

  return {
    prompt: parts.join('\n\n'),
    images: parsed.images,
  };
}

```
</details>

```typescript
}

/** 持久化的任务记录 */
export interface TaskRecord {
  /** 任务文件夹绝对路径 */
  dirPath: string;
  /** Markdown 文件名（不含扩展名） */
  mdName: string;
  /** 模型名 */
  model: string;
  /** 所有 job */
  jobs: JobState[];
  /** 任务真实开始时间（ISO 字符串） */
  createdAt: string;
}

/** 扩展配置 */
export interface ExtensionConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

/** 素材库中的单张图片 */
export interface MaterialImage {
  /** 经 asWebviewUri 转换后的 URI，webview 可直接渲染 */
  webviewUri: string;
  /** 文件系统原始路径，供插入引用使用 */
  fsPath: string;
}

/** 素材库 */
export interface MaterialLibrary {
  name: string;
  type: 'auto' | 'manual';
  /** 库的根目录路径（手动库可用来移除、自动库为层级目录） */
  path: string;
  images: MaterialImage[];
}

/** webview postMessage 协议 */
export type FrontendMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'settingsUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'materialAdd' }
  | { type: 'materialRemove'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertMaterial'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openMaterial'; imagePath: string };

export type BackendMessage =
  | { type: 'state'; config: ExtensionConfig; tasks: TaskRecord[]; mdFile: string | null; materials: MaterialLibrary[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskRecord[] }
  | { type: 'materialsUpdate'; materials: MaterialLibrary[] }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string };
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as crypto from 'crypto';
import { type BackendMessage, type FrontendMessage } from './shared';
import { readConfig, writeConfig } from './config';
import { getTasks, onTasksChange } from './generate';
import { scanMaterials, buildLocalResourceRoots, addManualPath, removeManualPath, insertMaterialRef } from './material';

/** 生成随机 nonce */
function getNonce(): string {
  return crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64');
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMdPath: string | null = null;

  constructor(
    private readonly _context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {
    // 任务变更实时推送
    onTasksChange((tasks) => {
      this._postMessage({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks });
    });
  }

  resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _resolveCtx: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    const webview = webviewView.webview;
    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: buildLocalResourceRoots(this._context.extensionUri, this._context),
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    webview.html = this._getHtml(webview, nonce);

    webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: FrontendMessage) => this._handleMessage(msg));

    webviewView.onDidChangeVisibility(() => {
      if (webviewView.visible) {
        this._pushState();
      }
    });
  }

  /** 素材库变更后刷新 localResourceRoots */
  private _refreshRoots(): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    this._view.webview.options = {
      ...this._view.webview.options,
      localResourceRoots: buildLocalResourceRoots(this._context.extensionUri, this._context),
    };
  }

  private _postMessage(msg: BackendMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  private async _pushState(): Promise<void> {
    const config = await readConfig(this._context);
    const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    const mdFile = activeEditor?.document?.fileName?.endsWith('.md')
      ? activeEditor.document.fileName
      : null;

    this._currentMdPath = mdFile;

    const materials = mdFile && this._view
      ? scanMaterials(mdFile, this._view.webview, this._context)
      : [];

    this._postMessage({
      type: 'state',
      config,
      tasks: getTasks(),
      mdFile,
      materials,
    });
  }

  private async _pushMaterials(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this._currentMdPath || !this._view) return;
    const materials = scanMaterials(this._currentMdPath, this._view.webview, this._context);
    this._postMessage({ type: 'materialsUpdate', materials });
  }

  private async _handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        await this._pushState();
        break;

      case 'settingsUpdate': {
        if (msg.key === '_openUrl') {
          vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          return;
        }
        await writeConfig(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        this._postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', key: msg.key, value: msg.value });
        break;
      }

      case 'generate':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;

      case 'preview':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;

      case 'materialAdd': {
        const added = await addManualPath(this._context);
        if (added) {
          this._refreshRoots();
          await this._pushMaterials();
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'materialRemove': {
        await removeManualPath(this._context, msg.path);
        this._refreshRoots();
        await this._pushMaterials();
        break;
      }

      case 'insertMaterial': {
        if (!this._currentMdPath) {
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        insertMaterialRef(this._currentMdPath, msg.imagePath);
        break;
      }

      case 'openMaterial': {
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', vscode.Uri.file(msg.imagePath));
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  private _getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview, nonce: string): string {
    const sidebarUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';
                 style-src 'unsafe-inline' ${webview.cspSource};
                 img-src ${webview.cspSource} https: data:;
                 font-src ${webview.cspSource};
                 connect-src https:;">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

```
</details>

>          } catch { /* silently skip */ }
>        }
>        // 3. Parsed body
>        parts.push(parsed.prompt);
>        return { prompt: parts.join('\n\n'), images: parsed.images };
>      }
>      ```

>    - **src/generate.ts** — TaskManager singleton (M1 sync, M3 async rewrite, M5 uses assemblePrompt)
>      - Module-level state: `_context`, `_tasks: TaskRecord[]`, `_timer`, `_polling` flag, `_sessionStart`, `_onChange` callback
>      - `initTaskManager(context)` — loads persisted tasks, marks submitting-no-id jobs as failed, starts timer if running jobs
>      - `generateImage(context, uri?)` — validates, parses MD via assemblePrompt, creates task folder, builds TaskRecord, pushes to list, fires background submissions via `jobs.map(async job => submitGenerate(...))`, then `Promise.allSettled(submitPromises)` checks all-failed case
>      - `pollOnce()` — reentrant lock, iterates running jobs, calls queryResult, handles succeeded/failed/running, transient→retry, non-transient→fail, manages task completion
>      - `handleTaskCompletion(task)` — removes from list, notification (with images→warning, without→error), empty folder cleanup
>      - `getTasks()`, `onTasksChange(cb)` — public API for sidebar
>      ```typescript

>      await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);
>      const allFailed = jobs.every((j) => j.status === 'failed');
>      ```

> 4. Errors and fixes:
>    - **M2 ESLint "all files ignored"**: ESLint flat config with `files: ['src/**/*.ts']` and TypeScript files needed @typescript-eslint/parser. Fixed by installing @typescript-eslint/parser and @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin and properly configuring the parser in eslint.config.mjs.
>    - **M2 unused import warnings**: Fixed by removing unused imports (vscode from api.ts, TaskRecord from generate.ts, scanHistoryImages function).
>    - **M3 unused import warnings**: Fixed in extension.ts (removed unused getTasks/onTasksChange) and generate.ts (removed IMAGE_EXTENSIONS, unused succeededJobs variable).
>    - **M4 unused import**: getManualPaths imported but not used in sidebar-provider.ts. Removed.
>    - **M5 buildRequestBody not exported**: Was re-exported at bottom of api.ts in M1 but the re-export line was removed in M3 rewrite. Fixed by changing `function buildRequestBody` to `export function buildRequestBody`.
>    - **M5 prompt.ts unused imports**: fs, path, vscode imported for M6 but not used yet. Removed temporarily, added back in M6.
>    - **M5 preview stripping replyType**: User reported that preview was incorrectly stripping `replyType` field from request params display. Spec §9 only says to strip `prompt` and `images`. Fixed by removing `k === 'replyType'` from the exclusion check.
> 
> 5. Problem Solving:
>    - **Config access pattern**: Resolved by using globalState for runtime values and workspace config as fallback. Writes always go to globalState (or secrets for apiKey). This supports both webview-based config changes and VS Code settings editor changes.
>    - **Seed injection timing**: `seedModelInjections()` runs before `registerWebviewViewProvider()` to ensure side bars see seeded values on first load.
>    - **Resume on restart**: `submitting` jobs without IDs are marked "提交未完成" on restart; timeout uses session start time (not wall clock) to prevent false timeout after shutdowns.
>    - **Task folder naming**: `task-yyMMddHHmmSS-seq` with seq incremented from folder listing to prevent collisions.

```typescript
/** 图片扩展名白名单（素材扫描、历史扫描、下载校验、MIME 推断共用） */
export const IMAGE_EXTENSIONS = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg'] as const;

/** 图片 MIME 映射 */
export const IMAGE_MIME_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  png: 'image/png',
  jpg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  gif: 'image/gif',
  webp: 'image/webp',
  bmp: 'image/bmp',
  svg: 'image/svg+xml',
};

/** gpt-image-2-vip 比例+分辨率 → 像素值换算表（两边均为 16 倍数，满足 VIP 约束） */
export const VIP_DIMENSIONS: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': '1024x1024', '2K': '1536x1536', '4K': '2048x2048' },
  '16:9': { '1K': '1280x720',  '2K': '1792x1024', '4K': '2560x1440' },
  '9:16': { '1K': '720x1280',  '2K': '1024x1792', '4K': '1440x2560' },
  '4:3':  { '1K': '1152x864',  '2K': '1600x1200', '4K': '2304x1728' },
  '3:4':  { '1K': '864x1152',  '2K': '1200x1600', '4K': '1728x2304' },
};

/** 模型系列判别 */
export function isGptImage2(model: string): boolean {
  return model === 'gpt-image-2';
}

export function isGptImage2Vip(model: string): boolean {
  return model === 'gpt-image-2-vip';
}

export function isNanoBanana(model: string): boolean {
  return model.startsWith('nano-banana');
}

/** 图片引用解析结果 */
export interface ImageRef {
  /** alt 文本 */
  alt: string;
  /** 原始路径（Markdown 中写的路径） */
  rawPath: string;
  /** 去重后的序号（从 1 开始） */
  index: number;
  /** base64 data URI */
  dataUri: string;
}

/** 解析后的 Markdown 内容 */
export interface ParsedContent {
  /** 替换后的正文（图片语法替换为 [imageN](name)） */
  prompt: string;
  /** 去重后的参考图数组 */
  images: ImageRef[];
}

/** API 生成请求参数 */
export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
}

/** API 生成响应 */
export interface GenerateResponse {
  id: string;
  status: 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  results?: { url: string }[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

/** 任务 job */
export interface JobState {
  /** job 在任务内的序号（0-based） */
  index: number;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  id?: string;
  error?: string;
  progress?: number;
  /** 已下载的本地图片路径数组 */
  downloadedPaths: string[];
}

/** 持久化的任务记录 */
export interface TaskRecord {
  /** 任务文件夹绝对路径 */
  dirPath: string;
  /** Markdown 文件名（不含扩展名） */
  mdName: string;
  /** 模型名 */
  model: string;
  /** 所有 job */
  jobs: JobState[];
  /** 任务真实开始时间（ISO 字符串） */
  createdAt: string;
}

/** 扩展配置 */
export interface ExtensionConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

/** 素材库中的单张图片 */
export interface MaterialImage {
  /** 经 asWebviewUri 转换后的 URI，webview 可直接渲染 */
  webviewUri: string;
  /** 文件系统原始路径，供插入引用使用 */
  fsPath: string;
}

/** 素材库 */
export interface MaterialLibrary {
  name: string;
  type: 'auto' | 'manual';
  /** 库的根目录路径（手动库可用来移除、自动库为层级目录） */
  path: string;
  images: MaterialImage[];
}

/** webview postMessage 协议 */
export type FrontendMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'preview' }
  | { type: 'settingsUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'materialAdd' }
  | { type: 'materialRemove'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertMaterial'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openMaterial'; imagePath: string };

export type BackendMessage =
  | { type: 'state'; config: ExtensionConfig; tasks: TaskRecord[]; mdFile: string | null; materials: MaterialLibrary[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: TaskRecord[] }
  | { type: 'materialsUpdate'; materials: MaterialLibrary[] }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string };

```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as crypto from 'crypto';
import { type BackendMessage, type FrontendMessage } from './shared';
import { readConfig, writeConfig } from './config';
import { getTasks, onTasksChange } from './generate';
import { scanMaterials, buildLocalResourceRoots, addManualPath, removeManualPath, insertMaterialRef } from './material';

/** 生成随机 nonce */
function getNonce(): string {
  return crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64');
}

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMdPath: string | null = null;

  constructor(
    private readonly _context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  ) {
    // 任务变更实时推送
    onTasksChange((tasks) => {
      this._postMessage({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks });
    });
  }

  resolveWebviewView(
    webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,
    _resolveCtx: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,
    _token: vscode.CancellationToken,
  ): void {
    this._view = webviewView;

    const webview = webviewView.webview;
    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: buildLocalResourceRoots(this._context.extensionUri, this._context),
    };

    const nonce = getNonce();
    webview.html = this._getHtml(webview, nonce);

    webview.onDidReceiveMessage((msg: FrontendMessage) => this._handleMessage(msg));

    webviewView.onDidChangeVisibility(() => {
      if (webviewView.visible) {
        this._pushState();
      }
    });
  }

  /** 素材库变更后刷新 localResourceRoots */
  private _refreshRoots(): void {
    if (!this._view) return;
    this._view.webview.options = {
      ...this._view.webview.options,
      localResourceRoots: buildLocalResourceRoots(this._context.extensionUri, this._context),
    };
  }

  private _postMessage(msg: BackendMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  private async _pushState(): Promise<void> {
    const config = await readConfig(this._context);
    const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    const mdFile = activeEditor?.document?.fileName?.endsWith('.md')
      ? activeEditor.document.fileName
      : null;

    this._currentMdPath = mdFile;

    const materials = mdFile && this._view
      ? scanMaterials(mdFile, this._view.webview, this._context)
      : [];

    this._postMessage({
      type: 'state',
      config,
      tasks: getTasks(),
      mdFile,
      materials,
    });
  }

  private async _pushMaterials(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this._currentMdPath || !this._view) return;
    const materials = scanMaterials(this._currentMdPath, this._view.webview, this._context);
    this._postMessage({ type: 'materialsUpdate', materials });
  }

  private async _handleMessage(msg: FrontendMessage): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init':
        await this._pushState();
        break;

      case 'settingsUpdate': {
        if (msg.key === '_openUrl') {
          vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(String(msg.value)));
          return;
        }
        await writeConfig(this._context, msg.key, msg.value);
        this._postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', key: msg.key, value: msg.value });
        break;
      }

      case 'generate':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.generateImage');
        break;

      case 'preview':
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('image-flow.previewRequest');
        break;

      case 'materialAdd': {
        const added = await addManualPath(this._context);
        if (added) {
          this._refreshRoots();
          await this._pushMaterials();
        }
        break;
      }

      case 'materialRemove': {
        await removeManualPath(this._context, msg.path);
        this._refreshRoots();
        await this._pushMaterials();
        break;
      }

      case 'insertMaterial': {
        if (!this._currentMdPath) {
          vscode.window.showWarningMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        insertMaterialRef(this._currentMdPath, msg.imagePath);
        break;
      }

      case 'openMaterial': {
        vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', vscode.Uri.file(msg.imagePath));
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  private _getHtml(webview: vscode.Webview, nonce: string): string {
    const sidebarUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const cssUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this._context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';
                 style-src 'unsafe-inline' ${webview.cspSource};
                 img-src ${webview.cspSource} https: data:;
                 font-src ${webview.cspSource};
                 connect-src https:;">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${cssUri}">
  <title>AI 绘图</title>
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

```

```typescript
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';

// ---- VSCode Webview API ----
declare function acquireVsCodeApi(): {
  postMessage(msg: unknown): void;
  getState(): unknown;
  setState(state: unknown): void;
};
const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi();

// ---- 类型 ----
interface ExtensionConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

interface MaterialImage {
  webviewUri: string;
  fsPath: string;
}

interface MaterialLibrary {
  name: string;
  type: 'auto' | 'manual';
  path: string;
  images: MaterialImage[];
}

interface StateMessage {
  type: 'state';
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  tasks: unknown[];
  mdFile: string | null;
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
}

interface ConfigUpdateMessage {
  type: 'configUpdate';
  key: string;
  value: unknown;
}

interface MaterialsUpdateMessage {
  type: 'materialsUpdate';
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
}

type BackendMessage =
  | StateMessage
  | ConfigUpdateMessage
  | MaterialsUpdateMessage
  | { type: 'error'; message: string };

// ---- 常量 ----
const MODEL_OPTIONS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];
const RATIO_OPTIONS = ['1:1', '16:9', '9:16', '4:3', '3:4'];
const SIZE_OPTIONS = ['1K', '2K', '4K'];
const NODE_OPTIONS = [
  { label: '国内节点', value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' },
  { label: '全球节点', value: 'https://grsaiapi.com' },
];

function defaultConfig(): ExtensionConfig {
  return {
    apiKey: '',
    baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
    model: 'nano-banana-2',
    aspectRatio: '3:4',
    imageSize: '1K',
    concurrency: 1,
    workbenchCols: 4,
    tasksCols: 2,
    modelInjections: {},
  };
}

// ---- App 根组件 ----
function App() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<ExtensionConfig>(defaultConfig);
  const [mdFile, setMdFile] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [materials, setMaterials] = useState<MaterialLibrary[]>([]);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ message: string; isError: boolean }>({ message: '', isError: false });
  const [injectionModel, setInjectionModel] = useState(config.model);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent) => {
      const msg = e.data as BackendMessage;
      if (!msg || typeof msg.type !== 'string') return;

      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'state': {
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setMdFile(msg.mdFile);
          setMaterials(msg.materials);
          setInjectionModel(msg.config.model);
          break;
        }
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, [msg.key]: msg.value }));
          break;
        case 'materialsUpdate':
          setMaterials(msg.materials);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setStatus({ message: msg.message, isError: true });
          break;
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const updateSetting = useCallback((key: string, value: unknown) => {
    setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, [key]: value }));
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'settingsUpdate', key, value });
  }, []);

  const updateInjection = useCallback((model: string, text: string) => {
    const updated = { ...config.modelInjections, [model]: text };
    updateSetting('modelInjections', updated);
  }, [config.modelInjections, updateSetting]);

  const handleGenerate = useCallback(() => {
    setStatus({ message: '正在提交…', isError: false });
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  }, []);

  const handlePreview = useCallback(() => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'preview' });
  }, []);

  const mdDisplayName = mdFile
    ? mdFile.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || mdFile
    : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  return (
    <Tabs.Root className="tabs-root" defaultValue="workbench">
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">工作台</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">任务</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">设置</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          mdDisplayName={mdDisplayName}
          materials={materials}
          status={status}
          onUpdateSetting={updateSetting}
          onGenerate={handleGenerate}
          onPreview={handlePreview}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab
          config={config}
          injectionModel={injectionModel}
          onInjectionModelChange={setInjectionModel}
          onUpdateSetting={updateSetting}
          onUpdateInjection={updateInjection}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

// ---- 素材库区组件 ----
function MaterialSection({ libraries, cols }: { libraries: MaterialLibrary[]; cols: number }) {
  const handleOpen = (fsPath: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'openMaterial', imagePath: fsPath });
  };

  const handleInsert = (e: React.MouseEvent, fsPath: string) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'insertMaterial', imagePath: fsPath });
  };

  const handleRemove = (libPath: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'materialRemove', path: libPath });
  };

  return (
    <div className="materials-area">
      {libraries.map((lib) => (
        <div key={lib.path} className="material-library">
          <div className="library-header">
            <span className="library-name">
              {lib.type === 'auto' ? `当前路径 / ${lib.name}` : lib.name}
            </span>
            {lib.type === 'manual' && (
              <button className="library-remove" onClick={() => handleRemove(lib.path)} title="移除此素材库">
                ×
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
          <div
            className="material-grid"
            style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)` }}
          >
            {lib.images.map((img) => (
              <img
                key={img.fsPath}
                className="material-thumb"
                src={img.webviewUri}
                onClick={() => handleOpen(img.fsPath)}
                onContextMenu={(e) => handleInsert(e, img.fsPath)}
                title="左键打开 · 右键插入引用"
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
      <button
        className="material-add-btn"
        onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'materialAdd' })}
      >
        + 添加素材库
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 工作台标签页 ----
function WorkbenchTab({
  config,
  mdDisplayName,
  materials,
  status,
  onUpdateSetting,
  onGenerate,
  onPreview,
}: {
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  mdDisplayName: string;
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
  status: { message: string; isError: boolean };
  onUpdateSetting: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
  onPreview: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div>
      {/* 素材库区 */}
      {materials.length > 0 ? (
        <MaterialSection libraries={materials} cols={config.workbenchCols} />
      ) : (
        <div className="material-placeholder">
          {mdDisplayName === '未打开 Markdown 文件'
            ? '打开 Markdown 文件以显示素材库'
            : '当前路径无图片，添加手动素材库开始'}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 底部停靠区 */}
      <div className="workbench-bottom">
        <div className="workbench-controls">
          <select value={config.model} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('model', e.target.value)}>
            {MODEL_OPTIONS.map((m) => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={config.imageSize} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('imageSize', e.target.value)}>
            {SIZE_OPTIONS.map((s) => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={config.aspectRatio} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}>
            {RATIO_OPTIONS.map((r) => <option key={r} value={r}>{r}</option>)}
          </select>
          <input
            type="number"
            min={1} max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('concurrency', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1)}
          />
        </div>

        <div className="generate-row">
          <span className="md-name">{mdDisplayName}</span>
          <button onClick={onPreview}>预览请求</button>
          <button onClick={onGenerate}>生成</button>
        </div>

        <div className={`status-row ${status.isError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
          {status.message}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 任务标签页 ----
function TasksTab() {
  return (
    <div className="task-placeholder">
      暂无任务。在 Markdown 文件中右键或使用工作台按钮开始生成。
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 设置标签页 ----
function SettingsTab({
  config,
  injectionModel,
  onInjectionModelChange,
  onUpdateSetting,
  onUpdateInjection,
}: {
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  injectionModel: string;
  onInjectionModelChange: (model: string) => void;
  onUpdateSetting: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onUpdateInjection: (model: string, text: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div>
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">API Key</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <input
            type="password"
            className="grow"
            value={config.apiKey}
            placeholder="sk-xxxxxxxx"
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('apiKey', e.target.value)}
          />
        </div>
        <a
          className="link"
          onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'settingsUpdate', key: '_openUrl', value: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' })}
        >
          获取 API Key →
        </a>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">API 节点</div>
        <select value={config.baseUrl} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('baseUrl', e.target.value)}>
          {NODE_OPTIONS.map((n) => <option key={n.value} value={n.value}>{n.label}</option>)}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">显示</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>工作台列数</label>
          <input
            type="number" className="grow" min={1} max={8}
            value={config.workbenchCols}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('workbenchCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 4)}
          />
        </div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>任务列数</label>
          <input
            type="number" className="grow" min={1} max={8}
            value={config.tasksCols}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('tasksCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 2)}
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">模型注入提示词</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>模型</label>
          <select className="grow" value={injectionModel} onChange={(e) => onInjectionModelChange(e.target.value)}>
            {MODEL_OPTIONS.map((m) => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
        <textarea
          value={config.modelInjections[injectionModel] || ''}
          placeholder="输入该模型的注入提示词（留空则不注入）"
          onChange={(e) => onUpdateInjection(injectionModel, e.target.value)}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// 挂载 React 根节点
const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');
if (rootEl) {
  createRoot(rootEl).render(<App />);
}

```
</details>

> // 后台并发提交（不阻塞返回，卡片已建）

> });
> ```
> 
> Now for the history scanning. I need to scan `task-*` directories in the MD file's directory. Let me write a function in generate.ts:
> 
> ```typescript
> export function scanHistory(mdDir: string, excludePaths: Set<string>): { name: string; dirPath: string; imagePaths: string[] }[] {
>   const results: { name: string; dirPath: string; imagePaths: string[] }[] = [];
>   let entries: fs.Dirent[];
>   try {
>     entries = fs.readdirSync(mdDir, { withFileTypes: true });
>   } catch {
>     return results;
>   }
>   
>   for (const entry of entries) {
>     if (!entry.isDirectory() || !entry.name.startsWith('task-')) continue;
>     const dirPath = path.join(mdDir, entry.name);
>     if (excludePaths.has(dirPath)) continue;
>     
>     let files: string[];
>     try {
>       files = fs.readdirSync(dirPath);
>     } catch {
>       continue;
>     }
>     
>     const imagePaths = files
>       .filter(f => {
>         const ext = path.extname(f).toLowerCase().slice(1);
>         return IMAGE_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext as any);
>       })
>       .map(f => path.join(dirPath, f))
>       .sort();
>     
>     results.push({ name: entry.name, dirPath, imagePaths });

> ```tsx

>   return () => clearInterval(timer);
> }, []);
> ```

> Then the elapsed time display uses `tick` to trigger re-renders. But React should handle this automatically since state changes cause re-renders.

```typescript
  // 后台并发提交
  const submitPromises = jobs.map(async (job) => {
    try {
      const jobId = await submitGenerate({
        model: config.model,
        prompt: parsed.prompt,
        images: parsed.images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
        aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
        imageSize: config.imageSize,
        baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
        apiKey: config.apiKey,
      });
      job.id = jobId;
      job.status = 'running';
    } catch (e) {
      job.status = 'failed';
      job.error = String(e);
    }
    persist();
    notifyChange();
  });

  // 等待全部提交完成以处理「全部失败」的情况
  await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);

  const allFailed = jobs.every((j) => j.status === 'failed');
  if (allFailed) {
    removeTask(task);
    try { fs.rmdirSync(taskDir); } catch { /* 空文件夹清理 */ }
    const errors = [...new Set(jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`提交失败: ${errors}`);
  }
}
```

```diff
+	/** 扫描 MD 所在目录下的 task-* 历史文件夹 */
+	export function scanHistory(mdDir: string, excludePaths: Set<string>): { name: string; dirPath: string; imagePaths: string[] }[] {
+	  const results: { name: string; dirPath: string; imagePaths: string[] }[] = [];
+	  let entries: fs.Dirent[];

+	    entries = fs.readdirSync(mdDir, { withFileTypes: true });

+	    if (!entry.isDirectory() || !entry.name.startsWith('task-')) continue;
+	    const dirPath = path.join(mdDir, entry.name);
+	    if (excludePaths.has(dirPath)) continue;
+
+	    let files: string[];
+	    try {
+	      files = fs.readdirSync(dirPath);
+	    } catch {
+	      continue;
+	    }
+
+	    const imagePaths = files
+	      .filter((f) => {
+	        const ext = path.extname(f).toLowerCase().slice(1);
+	        return (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS as readonly string[]).includes(ext);
+	      })
+	      .map((f) => path.join(dirPath, f))
+	      .sort();
+
+	    results.push({ name: entry.name, dirPath, imagePaths });
+	  }
+
+	  results.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
+	  return results;
+	}
```

```typescript
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { assemblePrompt } from './prompt';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult, downloadResults, isTransientError } from './api';
import { readConfig } from './config';
import { type TaskRecord, type JobState, IMAGE_EXTENSIONS } from './shared';

// ---- 模块级状态 ----
const POLL_INTERVAL = 4000; // 4 秒
const TASK_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1000; // 10 分钟
const TASKS_KEY = 'image-flow.tasks';

let _context: vscode.ExtensionContext | null = null;
let _tasks: TaskRecord[] = [];
let _timer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
let _polling = false;
let _sessionStart = Date.now();
let _onChange: ((tasks: TaskRecord[]) => void) | null = null;

// ---- 持久化 ----

function persist(): void {
  if (!_context) return;
  _context.globalState.update(TASKS_KEY, _tasks);
}

function loadPersisted(): TaskRecord[] {
  if (!_context) return [];
  return _context.globalState.get<TaskRecord[]>(TASKS_KEY, []);
}

// ---- 公开接口 ----

/** 初始化任务管理器（扩展激活时调用，含续拉逻辑） */
export function initTaskManager(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  _context = context;
  _sessionStart = Date.now();
  _tasks = loadPersisted();

  // 续拉：submitting 态无 id 的 job 直接判失败
  for (const task of _tasks) {
    for (const job of task.jobs) {
      if (job.status === 'submitting' && !job.id) {
        job.status = 'failed';
        job.error = '提交未完成';
      }
    }
  }
  persist();
  notifyChange();

  // 若有 running job，立即拉一次并启动定时器
  if (hasRunningJobs()) {
    pollOnce();
    ensureTimer();
  }
}

/** 获取当前任务列表 */
export function getTasks(): TaskRecord[] {
  return _tasks;
}

/** 注册任务变更回调（侧栏用） */
export function onTasksChange(cb: (tasks: TaskRecord[]) => void): void {
  _onChange = cb;
}

// ---- 生成流程 ----

/** 生成 yyMMddHHmmSS 时间戳 */
function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {
  const y = String(date.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const M = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const h = String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${M}${d}${h}${m}${s}`;
}

/** 在同目录下创建任务文件夹 task-yyMMddHHmmSS-seq */
function createTaskDir(mdDir: string): string {
  const ts = formatTimestamp(new Date());
  let seq = 1;
  let dirPath: string;
  do {
    const seqStr = String(seq).padStart(2, '0');
    dirPath = path.join(mdDir, `task-${ts}-${seqStr}`);
    seq++;
  } while (fs.existsSync(dirPath));
  fs.mkdirSync(dirPath, { recursive: true });
  return dirPath;
}

/** 获取任务内下一个接续序号 */
function nextSeq(task: TaskRecord): number {
  let count = 0;
  for (const job of task.jobs) {
    count += job.downloadedPaths.length;
  }
  return count + 1;
}

/** 生成图片命令 */
export async function generateImage(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, uri?: vscode.Uri): Promise<void> {
  const config = await readConfig(context);

  if (!config.apiKey) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先在侧栏设置页填写 API Key');
    return;
  }

  let mdUri = uri;
  if (!mdUri) {
    const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!editor || !editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }
    mdUri = editor.document.uri;
  }

  const mdPath = mdUri.fsPath;
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
  const mdName = path.basename(mdPath, '.md');

  let content: string;
  try {
    content = fs.readFileSync(mdPath, 'utf-8');
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`读取 Markdown 文件失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  let parsed;
  try {
    parsed = assemblePrompt(content, mdDir, mdPath, config);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`解析 Markdown 失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  let taskDir: string;
  try {
    taskDir = createTaskDir(mdDir);
  } catch (e) {
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`创建任务文件夹失败: ${e}`);
    return;
  }

  const concurrency = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, config.concurrency));
  const now = new Date().toISOString();

  // 立即建卡：全部 job 置 submitting 态
  const jobs: JobState[] = Array.from({ length: concurrency }, (_, i) => ({
    index: i,
    status: 'submitting' as const,
    downloadedPaths: [],
  }));

  const task: TaskRecord = { dirPath: taskDir, mdName, model: config.model, jobs, createdAt: now };
  _tasks.push(task);
  persist();
  notifyChange();
  ensureTimer();

  // 后台并发提交
  const submitPromises = jobs.map(async (job) => {
    try {
      const jobId = await submitGenerate({
        model: config.model,
        prompt: parsed.prompt,
        images: parsed.images.map((img) => img.dataUri),
        aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
        imageSize: config.imageSize,
        baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
        apiKey: config.apiKey,
      });
      job.id = jobId;
      job.status = 'running';
    } catch (e) {
      job.status = 'failed';
      job.error = String(e);
    }
    persist();
    notifyChange();
  });

  // 等待全部提交完成以处理「全部失败」的情况
  await Promise.allSettled(submitPromises);

  const allFailed = jobs.every((j) => j.status === 'failed');
  if (allFailed) {
    removeTask(task);
    try { fs.rmdirSync(taskDir); } catch { /* 空文件夹清理 */ }
    const errors = [...new Set(jobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`提交失败: ${errors}`);
  }
}

// ---- 轮询引擎 ----

/** 是否存在 running 态 job */
function hasRunningJobs(): boolean {
  for (const task of _tasks) {
    for (const job of task.jobs) {
      if (job.status === 'running') return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

/** 确保定时器在运转 */
function ensureTimer(): void {
  if (_timer) return;
  _timer = setInterval(pollOnce, POLL_INTERVAL);
}

/** 停止定时器 */
function stopTimer(): void {
  if (!_timer) return;
  clearInterval(_timer);
  _timer = null;
}

/** 单次轮询（受重入锁保护） */
async function pollOnce(): Promise<void> {
  if (_polling) return;
  _polling = true;

  try {
    const config = await readConfig(_context!);
    const now = Date.now();

    for (const task of _tasks) {
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status !== 'running') continue;

        // 超时兜底：本次会话已超 10 分钟
        if (now - _sessionStart > TASK_TIMEOUT) {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = '任务超时';
          persist();
          notifyChange();
          continue;
        }

        try {
          const result = await queryResult(job.id!, config.baseUrl, config.apiKey);

          if (result.status === 'succeeded') {
            if (result.results && result.results.length > 0) {
              try {
                const seq = nextSeq(task);
                await downloadResults(result.results, task.dirPath, task.mdName, seq);
              } catch (e) {
                // 写盘失败 → 判失败
                job.status = 'failed';
                job.error = String(e);
                persist();
                notifyChange();
                continue;
              }
            }
            job.status = 'succeeded';
            job.progress = 100;
          } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
            job.status = result.status;
            job.error = result.error || `生成失败 (${result.status})`;
          } else {
            // running：更新进度
            job.progress = result.progress;
          }
        } catch (e) {
          if (isTransientError(e)) {
            // 瞬时错误，保持 running，下轮重试
            continue;
          }
          // 不可重试 → 判失败
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = String(e);
        }

        persist();
        notifyChange();
      }

      // 任务终结处理
      if (task.jobs.every((j) => j.status !== 'running' && j.status !== 'submitting')) {
        handleTaskCompletion(task);
      }
    }
  } finally {
    _polling = false;
    // 无 running job 则停定时器
    if (!hasRunningJobs()) {
      stopTimer();
    }
  }
}

// ---- 任务生命周期 ----

function removeTask(task: TaskRecord): void {
  const idx = _tasks.indexOf(task);
  if (idx >= 0) {
    _tasks.splice(idx, 1);
    persist();
    notifyChange();
  }
}

function notifyChange(): void {
  if (_onChange) _onChange(_tasks);
}

/** 任务全部 job 终结后的清理与通知 */
function handleTaskCompletion(task: TaskRecord): void {
  const failedJobs = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation');

  // 统计所有已下载图片
  const allImages: string[] = [];
  for (const job of task.jobs) {
    allImages.push(...job.downloadedPaths);
  }

  // 从持久化列表移除
  removeTask(task);

  if (allImages.length === 0) {
    // 无任何成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
    try { fs.rmdirSync(task.dirPath); } catch { /* */ }
    const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 失败: ${errors || '无成图'}`);
  } else if (failedJobs.length > 0) {
    // 有成图但有失败 → 警告通知
    const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
      `任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 部分成功（${allImages.length} 张）。错误: ${errors}`,
    );
  } else {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
      `任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 完成（${allImages.length} 张）`,
    );
  }
}
```

```typescript
    status: 'submitting' as const,
    downloadedPaths: [],

}

function notifyChange(): void {
  if (_onChange) _onChange(_tasks);
}

/** 任务全部 job 终结后的清理与通知 */
function handleTaskCompletion(task: TaskRecord): void {
  const failedJobs = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation');

  // 统计所有已下载图片
  const allImages: string[] = [];
  for (const job of task.jobs) {
    allImages.push(...job.downloadedPaths);
  }

  // 从持久化列表移除
  removeTask(task);

  if (allImages.length === 0) {
    // 无任何成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
    try { fs.rmdirSync(task.dirPath); } catch { /* */ }
    const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 失败: ${errors || '无成图'}`);
  } else if (failedJobs.length > 0) {
    // 有成图但有失败 → 警告通知
    const errors = [...new Set(failedJobs.map((j) => j.error).filter(Boolean))].join('; ');
    vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
      `任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 部分成功（${allImages.length} 张）。错误: ${errors}`,
    );
  } else {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
      `任务 ${path.basename(task.dirPath)} 完成（${allImages.length} 张）`,
    );
  }
}

// ---- 历史扫描 ----

/** 获取当前活跃任务的文件夹路径集合（用于历史扫描排除） */
export function getActiveTaskPaths(): Set<string> {
  const paths = new Set<string>();
  for (const task of _tasks) {
    paths.add(task.dirPath);
  }
  return paths;
}

/** 扫描 MD 所在目录下的 task-* 历史文件夹 */
export function scanHistory(mdDir: string, excludePaths: Set<string>): { name: string; dirPath: string; imagePaths: string[] }[] {
  const results: { name: string; dirPath: string; imagePaths: string[] }[] = [];
  let entries: fs.Dirent[];
  try {
    entries = fs.readdirSync(mdDir, { withFileTypes: true });
  } catch {
    return results;
  }

  for (const entry of entries) {
    if (!entry.isDirectory() || !entry.name.startsWith('task-')) continue;
    const dirPath = path.join(mdDir, entry.name);
    if (excludePaths.has(dirPath)) continue;

    let files: string[];
    try {
      files = fs.readdirSync(dirPath);
    } catch {
      continue;
    }

    const imagePaths = files
      .filter((f) => {
        const ext = path.extname(f).toLowerCase().slice(1);
        return (IMAGE_EXTENSIONS as readonly string[]).includes(ext);
      })
      .map((f) => path.join(dirPath, f))
      .sort();

    results.push({ name: entry.name, dirPath, imagePaths });
  }

  // 按文件夹名倒序（最新在前）
  results.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));
  return results;
}
```

```typescript
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';

// ---- VSCode Webview API ----
declare function acquireVsCodeApi(): {
  postMessage(msg: unknown): void;
  getState(): unknown;
  setState(state: unknown): void;
};
const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi();

// ---- 类型 ----
interface ExtensionConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

interface MaterialImage {
  webviewUri: string;
  fsPath: string;
}

interface MaterialLibrary {
  name: string;
  type: 'auto' | 'manual';
  path: string;
  images: MaterialImage[];
}

interface JobState {
  index: number;
  status: 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  id?: string;
  error?: string;
  progress?: number;
}

interface TaskCard {
  name: string;
  dirPath: string;
  type: 'active' | 'history';
  model?: string;
  jobs?: JobState[];
  createdAt?: string;
  imagePaths?: string[];
}

interface StateMessage {
  type: 'state';
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  tasks: unknown[];
  cards: TaskCard[];
  mdFile: string | null;
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
}

interface ConfigUpdateMessage {
  type: 'configUpdate';
  key: string;
  value: unknown;
}

interface TaskUpdateMessage {
  type: 'taskUpdate';
  tasks: unknown[];
  cards: TaskCard[];
}

interface MaterialsUpdateMessage {
  type: 'materialsUpdate';
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
}

type BackendMessage =
  | StateMessage
  | ConfigUpdateMessage
  | TaskUpdateMessage
  | MaterialsUpdateMessage
  | { type: 'error'; message: string };

// ---- 常量 ----
const MODEL_OPTIONS = ['nano-banana-2', 'nano-banana-pro', 'gpt-image-2', 'gpt-image-2-vip'];
const RATIO_OPTIONS = ['1:1', '16:9', '9:16', '4:3', '3:4'];
const SIZE_OPTIONS = ['1K', '2K', '4K'];
const NODE_OPTIONS = [
  { label: '国内节点', value: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn' },
  { label: '全球节点', value: 'https://grsaiapi.com' },
];

function defaultConfig(): ExtensionConfig {
  return {
    apiKey: '',
    baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
    model: 'nano-banana-2',
    aspectRatio: '3:4',
    imageSize: '1K',
    concurrency: 1,
    workbenchCols: 4,
    tasksCols: 2,
    modelInjections: {},
  };
}

// ---- 辅助函数 ----

/** 格式化已历时长为 mm:ss 或 h:mm:ss */
function formatElapsed(createdAt: string): string {
  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(createdAt).getTime();
  if (diff < 0) return '0:00';
  const totalSec = Math.floor(diff / 1000);
  const h = Math.floor(totalSec / 3600);
  const m = Math.floor((totalSec % 3600) / 60);
  const s = totalSec % 60;
  const mm = String(m).padStart(2, '0');
  const ss = String(s).padStart(2, '0');
  return h > 0 ? `${h}:${mm}:${ss}` : `${m}:${ss}`;
}

/** 计算活跃任务总进度 0-100 */
function calcProgress(jobs: JobState[]): number {
  if (jobs.length === 0) return 0;
  let total = 0;
  for (const j of jobs) {
    if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation') {
      total += 100;
    } else if (j.status === 'running') {
      total += j.progress ?? 0;
    }
    // submitting → 0
  }
  return Math.round(total / jobs.length);
}

/** 获取 job 状态的可读文本 */
function jobStatusLabel(status: string): string {
  switch (status) {
    case 'submitting': return '提交中';
    case 'running': return '生成中';
    case 'succeeded': return '完成';
    case 'failed': return '失败';
    case 'violation': return '违规';
    default: return status;
  }
}

// ---- App 根组件 ----
function App() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<ExtensionConfig>(defaultConfig);
  const [mdFile, setMdFile] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [materials, setMaterials] = useState<MaterialLibrary[]>([]);
  const [cards, setCards] = useState<TaskCard[]>([]);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ message: string; isError: boolean }>({ message: '', isError: false });
  const [injectionModel, setInjectionModel] = useState(config.model);
  const [, setTick] = useState(0);

  // 每秒刷新 tick 以驱动已历时重渲染
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => setTick((t) => t + 1), 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent) => {
      const msg = e.data as BackendMessage;
      if (!msg || typeof msg.type !== 'string') return;

      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'state': {
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setMdFile(msg.mdFile);
          setMaterials(msg.materials);
          setCards(msg.cards);
          setInjectionModel(msg.config.model);
          break;
        }
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, [msg.key]: msg.value }));
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setCards(msg.cards);
          break;
        case 'materialsUpdate':
          setMaterials(msg.materials);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setStatus({ message: msg.message, isError: true });
          break;
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const updateSetting = useCallback((key: string, value: unknown) => {
    setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, [key]: value }));
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'settingsUpdate', key, value });
  }, []);

  const updateInjection = useCallback((model: string, text: string) => {
    const updated = { ...config.modelInjections, [model]: text };
    updateSetting('modelInjections', updated);
  }, [config.modelInjections, updateSetting]);

  const handleGenerate = useCallback(() => {
    setStatus({ message: '正在提交…', isError: false });
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  }, []);

  const handlePreview = useCallback(() => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'preview' });
  }, []);

  const mdDisplayName = mdFile
    ? mdFile.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || mdFile
    : '未打开 Markdown 文件';

  return (
    <Tabs.Root className="tabs-root" defaultValue="workbench">
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">工作台</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">任务</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">设置</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench">
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          mdDisplayName={mdDisplayName}
          materials={materials}
          status={status}
          onUpdateSetting={updateSetting}
          onGenerate={handleGenerate}
          onPreview={handlePreview}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks">
        <TasksTab cards={cards} cols={config.tasksCols} />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings">
        <SettingsTab
          config={config}
          injectionModel={injectionModel}
          onInjectionModelChange={setInjectionModel}
          onUpdateSetting={updateSetting}
          onUpdateInjection={updateInjection}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

// ---- 素材库区组件 ----
function MaterialSection({ libraries, cols }: { libraries: MaterialLibrary[]; cols: number }) {
  const handleOpen = (fsPath: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'openMaterial', imagePath: fsPath });
  };

  const handleInsert = (e: React.MouseEvent, fsPath: string) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'insertMaterial', imagePath: fsPath });
  };

  const handleRemove = (libPath: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'materialRemove', path: libPath });
  };

  return (
    <div className="materials-area">
      {libraries.map((lib) => (
        <div key={lib.path} className="material-library">
          <div className="library-header">
            <span className="library-name">
              {lib.type === 'auto' ? `当前路径 / ${lib.name}` : lib.name}
            </span>
            {lib.type === 'manual' && (
              <button className="library-remove" onClick={() => handleRemove(lib.path)} title="移除此素材库">
                ×
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
          <div
            className="material-grid"
            style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)` }}
          >
            {lib.images.map((img) => (
              <img
                key={img.fsPath}
                className="material-thumb"
                src={img.webviewUri}
                onClick={() => handleOpen(img.fsPath)}
                onContextMenu={(e) => handleInsert(e, img.fsPath)}
                title="左键打开 · 右键插入引用"
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
      <button
        className="material-add-btn"
        onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'materialAdd' })}
      >
        + 添加素材库
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 工作台标签页 ----
function WorkbenchTab({
  config,
  mdDisplayName,
  materials,
  status,
  onUpdateSetting,
  onGenerate,
  onPreview,
}: {
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  mdDisplayName: string;
  materials: MaterialLibrary[];
  status: { message: string; isError: boolean };
  onUpdateSetting: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
  onPreview: () => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div>
      {/* 素材库区 */}
      {materials.length > 0 ? (
        <MaterialSection libraries={materials} cols={config.workbenchCols} />
      ) : (
        <div className="material-placeholder">
          {mdDisplayName === '未打开 Markdown 文件'
            ? '打开 Markdown 文件以显示素材库'
            : '当前路径无图片，添加手动素材库开始'}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 底部停靠区 */}
      <div className="workbench-bottom">
        <div className="workbench-controls">
          <select value={config.model} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('model', e.target.value)}>
            {MODEL_OPTIONS.map((m) => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={config.imageSize} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('imageSize', e.target.value)}>
            {SIZE_OPTIONS.map((s) => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={config.aspectRatio} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}>
            {RATIO_OPTIONS.map((r) => <option key={r} value={r}>{r}</option>)}
          </select>
          <input
            type="number"
            min={1} max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('concurrency', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1)}
          />
        </div>

        <div className="generate-row">
          <span className="md-name">{mdDisplayName}</span>
          <button onClick={onPreview}>预览请求</button>
          <button onClick={onGenerate}>生成</button>
        </div>

        <div className={`status-row ${status.isError ? 'error' : ''}`}>
          {status.message}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 任务卡片 ----
function ActiveCard({ card }: { card: TaskCard }) {
  const jobs = card.jobs ?? [];
  const progress = calcProgress(jobs);
  const elapsed = card.createdAt ? formatElapsed(card.createdAt) : '0:00';

  return (
    <div className="task-card active">
      <div className="card-header">
        <span className="card-name">{card.name}</span>
        <span className="card-model">{card.model}</span>
      </div>

      {/* 进度条 */}
      <div className="progress-bar-track">
        <div
          className="progress-bar-fill"
          style={{ width: `${progress}%` }}
        />
      </div>

      <div className="card-meta">
        <span className="card-progress">{progress}%</span>
        <span className="card-elapsed">{elapsed}</span>
      </div>

      {/* job 状态明细 */}
      <div className="job-list">
        {jobs.map((j) => (
          <div key={j.index} className={`job-row ${j.status}`}>
            <span className="job-index">#{j.index + 1}</span>
            <span className="job-status">{jobStatusLabel(j.status)}</span>
            {j.status === 'running' && j.progress != null && (
              <span className="job-progress">{j.progress}%</span>
            )}
            {j.status === 'failed' && j.error && (
              <span className="job-error" title={j.error}>{j.error}</span>
            )}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function HistoryCard({ card, cols }: { card: TaskCard; cols: number }) {
  const images = card.imagePaths ?? [];

  const handleOpen = (imagePath: string) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'openMaterial', imagePath });
  };

  return (
    <div className="task-card history">
      <div className="card-header">
        <span className="card-name">{card.name}</span>
        <span className="card-count">{images.length} 张</span>
      </div>
      {images.length > 0 ? (
        <div
          className="history-grid"
          style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)` }}
        >
          {images.map((img) => (
            <img
              key={img}
              className="history-thumb"
              src={img}
              onClick={() => handleOpen(img)}
              title="点击在编辑器中打开"
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="history-empty">空文件夹</div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 任务标签页 ----
function TasksTab({ cards, cols }: { cards: TaskCard[]; cols: number }) {
  if (cards.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="task-placeholder">
        暂无任务。在 Markdown 文件中右键或使用工作台按钮开始生成。
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="task-list">
      {cards.map((card) =>
        card.type === 'active' ? (
          <ActiveCard key={card.dirPath} card={card} />
        ) : (
          <HistoryCard key={card.dirPath} card={card} cols={cols} />
        ),
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ---- 设置标签页 ----
function SettingsTab({
  config,
  injectionModel,
  onInjectionModelChange,
  onUpdateSetting,
  onUpdateInjection,
}: {
  config: ExtensionConfig;
  injectionModel: string;
  onInjectionModelChange: (model: string) => void;
  onUpdateSetting: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onUpdateInjection: (model: string, text: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div>
      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">API Key</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <input
            type="password"
            className="grow"
            value={config.apiKey}
            placeholder="sk-xxxxxxxx"
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('apiKey', e.target.value)}
          />
        </div>
        <a
          className="link"
          onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'settingsUpdate', key: '_openUrl', value: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys' })}
        >
          获取 API Key →
        </a>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">API 节点</div>
        <select value={config.baseUrl} onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('baseUrl', e.target.value)}>
          {NODE_OPTIONS.map((n) => <option key={n.value} value={n.value}>{n.label}</option>)}
        </select>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">显示</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>工作台列数</label>
          <input
            type="number" className="grow" min={1} max={8}
            value={config.workbenchCols}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('workbenchCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 4)}
          />
        </div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>任务列数</label>
          <input
            type="number" className="grow" min={1} max={8}
            value={config.tasksCols}
            onChange={(e) => onUpdateSetting('tasksCols', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 2)}
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="settings-section">
        <div className="section-title">模型注入提示词</div>
        <div className="form-row">
          <label>模型</label>
          <select className="grow" value={injectionModel} onChange={(e) => onInjectionModelChange(e.target.value)}>
            {MODEL_OPTIONS.map((m) => <option key={m} value={m}>{m}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
        <textarea
          value={config.modelInjections[injectionModel] || ''}
          placeholder="输入该模型的注入提示词（留空则不注入）"
          onChange={(e) => onUpdateInjection(injectionModel, e.target.value)}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// 挂载 React 根节点
const rootEl = document.getElementById('root');
if (rootEl) {
  createRoot(rootEl).render(<App />);
}

```
</details>

> 
> 2. **generate.ts**: 
>    - Changed `generateImage` to fire-and-forget (`.then()` instead of `await`), so the function returns immediately after creating the task card and launching background submissions.
>    - Added `getActiveTaskPaths()` to get Set of active task folder paths for exclusion.
>    - Added `scanHistory()` to scan `task-*` directories in the MD file's parent directory, filtering to image files, excluding active tasks, sorted by name descending.
> 
> 3. **sidebar-provider.ts**:
>    - Added `path`, `TaskCard`, `HistoryImage` imports.
>    - Added `onDidChangeActiveTextEditor` listener: updates `_currentMdPath` for .md files, doesn't clear on non-MD tabs, pushes state on every editor change.
>    - `_pushState()` now caches `_currentMdPath` separately from `mdFile` (sent to webview as null when non-MD tab is active).
>    - Added `_buildCards()` method that merges active tasks and history folders into a single sorted `TaskCard[]`.
>    - `onTasksChange` callback now builds cards and includes them in `taskUpdate`.
> 
> 4. **media/sidebar.tsx**:
>    - Added `HistoryImage`, `JobState`, `TaskCard` types.
>    - Added `TaskUpdateMessage` to `BackendMessage`.
>    - Components: `ActiveCard` (progress bar, elapsed time with per-second tick, job status list), `HistoryCard` (thumbnail grid with click-to-open), `TasksTab` (renders card list or placeholder).
>    - Helper functions: `formatElapsed` (mm:ss or h:mm:ss), `calcProgress` (weighted average across jobs), `jobStatusLabel` (Chinese labels).
> 
> 5. **media/sidebar.css**: Added styles for task cards, progress bar, card header/meta, job rows (color-coded by status), history grid, history thumbnails.
> 
> All four M7 sub-tasks are addressed:
> a) **Background submission** - `generateImage` returns immediately, submissions happen via `.then()`.
> b) **Progress bar & elapsed time** - ActiveCard shows progress bar and live elapsed time.
> c) **MD following** - Active editor listener updates cached MD path without clearing on non-MD tabs.
> d) **Task/history merged list** - `_buildCards()` merges active + history, sorted descending by name.

> 四检全绿（compile/check-types/lint 全部通过）。M7 实施完成，改动摘要：
> 
> | 需求 | 实施 |
> |---|---|
> | **后台提交** | `generateImage` 改为 `.then()` 非阻塞，建卡后立即返回 |
> | **进度条 + 计时** | `ActiveCard` 组件：加权进度条（每 job 1/N 权重），每秒刷新的已历时（`mm:ss` / `h:mm:ss`），job 状态明细着色（提交中/生成中/完成/失败/违规） |
> | **MD 跟随** | `onDidChangeActiveTextEditor` 监听，切到 .md 更新 `_currentMdPath`，切到非 MD 不清空；`_pushState` 中 `mdFile` 反映当前活动标签 |
> | **任务/历史合并倒序** | `_buildCards()` 合并 `getTasks()` 活跃任务 + `scanHistory()` 历史 `task-*` 文件夹，按名称倒序排列；历史卡片展示缩略图网格 |
> 
> 涉及文件：`src/shared.ts`（+`HistoryImage`, `TaskCard` 类型）、`src/generate.ts`（+`getActiveTaskPaths`, `scanHistory`）、`src/sidebar-provider.ts`（MD 跟随 + `_buildCards`）、`media/sidebar.tsx`（`ActiveCard` / `HistoryCard` / `TasksTab`）、`media/sidebar.css`（卡片样式）。
