```typescript
import * as path from 'path';
import * as fs from 'fs';
import { type ImageRef, type ParsedContent, IMAGE_MIME_MAP } from './shared';

/** 从 Markdown 内容中提取图片引用（按首次出现顺序，去重） */
function extractImageRefs(content: string): { alt: string; rawPath: string; fullMatch: string }[] {
  const refs: { alt: string; rawPath: string; fullMatch: string }[] = [];
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  let i = 0;

  while (i < content.length) {
    const imgStart = content.indexOf('![', i);
    if (imgStart === -1) break;

    const bracketEnd = content.indexOf('](', imgStart);
    if (bracketEnd === -1) break;

    const alt = content.slice(imgStart + 2, bracketEnd);

    const pathStart = bracketEnd + 2;
    let pathEnd: number;
    let rawPath: string;

    if (content[pathStart] === '<') {
      // 尖括号包裹路径：支持空格与半角括号
      pathEnd = content.indexOf('>)', pathStart);
      if (pathEnd === -1) {
        i = pathStart;
        continue;
      }
      rawPath = content.slice(pathStart + 1, pathEnd);
    } else {
      pathEnd = content.indexOf(')', pathStart);
      if (pathEnd === -1) {
        i = pathStart;
        continue;
      }
      rawPath = content.slice(pathStart, pathEnd);
    }

    const fullMatch = content.slice(imgStart, pathEnd + (content[pathStart] === '<' ? 2 : 1));

    if (!seen.has(rawPath)) {
      seen.add(rawPath);
      refs.push({ alt, rawPath, fullMatch });
    }

    i = pathEnd + (content[pathStart] === '<' ? 2 : 1);
  }

  return refs;
}

/** 根据路径推断 MIME 类型 */
function getMimeType(filePath: string): string {
  const ext = path.extname(filePath).toLowerCase().replace('.', '');
  return IMAGE_MIME_MAP[ext] || 'image/png';
}

/** 解析 Markdown：提取参考图 → 去重编号 → 读文件转 base64 → 替换正文 */
export function parseAndPrepareRequest(content: string, mdDir: string): ParsedContent {
  const trimmed = content.trim();
  if (!trimmed) {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }

  const refs = extractImageRefs(trimmed);

  // 读取参考图并编号
  const failedPaths: string[] = [];
  const images: ImageRef[] = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < refs.length; i++) {
    const { alt, rawPath } = refs[i];
    const absPath = path.resolve(mdDir, rawPath);
    try {
      const buf = fs.readFileSync(absPath);
      const mime = getMimeType(absPath);
      const dataUri = `data:${mime};base64,${buf.toString('base64')}`;
      images.push({ alt, rawPath, index: i + 1, dataUri });
    } catch {
      failedPaths.push(absPath);
    }
  }

  if (failedPaths.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败:\n${failedPaths.join('\n')}`);
  }

  // 替换正文中的图片语法为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
  let prompt = trimmed;
  for (let i = 0; i < refs.length; i++) {
    const { rawPath, fullMatch } = refs[i];
    // 在 images 中找到对应编号
    const img = images.find((im) => im.rawPath === rawPath);
    if (!img) continue; // 不会发生：已去重
    const baseName = path.basename(rawPath);
    const nameWithoutExt = baseName.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    prompt = prompt.split(fullMatch).join(`[image${img.index}](${nameWithoutExt})`);
  }

  return { prompt, images };
}
```

>   mdName: string,

> ): Promise<number> {

> It downloads to disk but doesn't update `job.downloadedPaths`. The downloadedPaths array is what _buildCards uses to show thumbnails in the active card. So downloaded images in active cards won't appear!
> 
> **ISSUE #13**: The format of `card.title` in ActiveCard uses `（` and `）` (full-width parentheses), but the spec says "文件夹名（模型）" which also uses full-width. ✅ 
> 
> Let me also check more edge cases:
> 
> **ISSUE #14**: The `downloadResults` function calls `fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(destPath), { recursive: true })` inside `downloadImage`. But the task directory was already created in `createTaskDir`. This is a redundant mkdir call but not harmful.
> 
> **ISSUE #15**: In `handleTaskCompletion`, `removeTask` is called before the notification. After `removeTask`, the task is gone from _tasks. Then `notifyChange` fires, which builds cards without the completed task. The history scan should pick up the folder since images are already on disk. This is correct per the "no-flicker" requirement. ✅
> 
> Actually wait, let me re-check the flow for ISSUE #12 more carefully. The `downloadResults` function downloads files to disk but doesn't return the downloaded paths or update `job.downloadedPaths`. Let me look at what happens after downloadResults:
> 
> In pollOnce:
> ```typescript
> if (result.status === 'succeeded') {
>   if (result.results && result.results.length > 0) {
>     try {
>       const seq = nextSeq(task);
>       await downloadResults(result.results, task.dirPath, task.mdName, seq);
>     } catch (e) {
>       job.status = 'failed';
>       job.error = String(e);
>       persist();
>       notifyChange();
>       continue;
>     }
>   }
>   job.status = 'succeeded';
>   job.progress = 100;
> }
> ```
> 
> After `downloadResults` succeeds, `job.status` is set to 'succeeded'. But `job.downloadedPaths` is never updated with the newly downloaded files. This means:
> 1. Active card won't show downloaded thumbnails
> 2. The next call to `nextSeq` for other jobs in the same task may produce duplicate filenames
> 
> This is a HIGH priority bug! The downloadedPaths must be updated.
> 
> Let me also check for ISSUE #16:
> 
> **ISSUE #16**: The `downloadResults` function returns `seq` (the next sequence number), but this return value is never used. This means `nextSeq` can produce the same starting seq for subsequent jobs in the same task, causing filename collisions. The caller should use the returned seq to update the base for the next job. But since jobs are independent and don't share state, this won't happen — each job calculates its own seq from `task.jobs` and existing `downloadedPaths` lengths. If `downloadedPaths` is never updated, `nextSeq` always returns 1 for every job's downloads. So all jobs would write to the same filenames, causing collisions.
> 
> This confirms ISSUE #12 is critical.

```typescript
}

/** 计算活跃任务总进度 0-100 */
function calcProgress(jobs: JobState[]): number {
  if (jobs.length === 0) return 0;
  let total = 0;
  for (const j of jobs) {
    if (j.status === 'succeeded' || j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation') {
      total += 100;
    } else if (j.status === 'running') {
      total += j.progress ?? 0;
    }
    // submitting → 0
  }
  return Math.round(total / jobs.length);
}

/** 获取 job 状态的可读文本 */
function jobStatusLabel(status: string): string {
  switch (status) {
    case 'submitting': return '提交中';
    case 'running': return '生成中';
    case 'succeeded': return '完成';
    case 'failed': return '失败';
    case 'violation': return '违规';
    default: return status;
  }
}

// ---- App 根组件 ----
function App() {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<ExtensionConfig>(defaultConfig);
  const [mdFile, setMdFile] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [materials, setMaterials] = useState<MaterialLibrary[]>([]);
  const [cards, setCards] = useState<TaskCard[]>([]);
  const [status, setStatus] = useState<{ message: string; isError: boolean }>({ message: '', isError: false });
  const [injectionModel, setInjectionModel] = useState(config.model);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('workbench');
  const [, setTick] = useState(0);

  // 每秒刷新 tick 以驱动已历时重渲染
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setInterval(() => setTick((t) => t + 1), 1000);
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e: MessageEvent) => {
      const msg = e.data as BackendMessage;
      if (!msg || typeof msg.type !== 'string') return;

      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'state': {
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setMdFile(msg.mdFile);
          setMaterials(msg.materials);
          setCards(msg.cards);
          setInjectionModel(msg.config.model);
          break;
        }
```

> | 2 | **高** | ✅ 已修复 | 生成按钮未禁用/未显示"生成中…"。加了 `submitting` 状态，提交期间按钮 disabled + 文案变为"生成中…" |
> | 3 | **高** | ✅ 已修复 | `onDidChangeActiveTextEditor` Disposable 泄露。推入 `this._context.subscriptions` |
> | 4 | **中** | ✅ 已修复 | 右键菜单触发时目标 MD 未成为生效 MD。`SidebarProvider.setCurrentMd()` + `extension.ts` 传 URI 时调用 |
> | 5 | **中** | ✅ 已修复 | 设置页注入模型下拉不跟随工作台模型。`configUpdate` 的 `model` 键变更时同步 `injectionModel` |
> | 6 | **低** | 📝 已知 | 切标签时展开/折叠状态丢失（Radix 默认卸载）。需 `forceMount` + CSS 隐藏，影响较小暂缓 |
